title: YOUTUBE LONG FORM EDITOR (FULL TIME- GOOD PAY, FLEXIBLE, 13 MONTH)
description:
This is a full-time position. You will be expected to produce 2 long-form videos per week. Scripts for both videos are delivered every Monday. Video 1 is due by end of day Tuesday. Video 2 is due by end of day Friday. Consistent on-time delivery is a 

core requirement of this role.



About Us:



We run AICONVERSATIONS, a growing YouTube channel dedicated to serious, educational content covering artificial intelligence, tech innovation, and industry developments. Our videos feature AI avatars with professional narration, and we are committed to delivering clean, modern, and informative content to a rapidly expanding audience. We do not do flashy gimmicks or meme-style edits. We build authoritative, retention-focused videos that educate and engage.



Role Overview:



We are looking for a skilled, dependable Video Editor who can take raw AI avatar footage and narration and transform it into polished, professional long-form YouTube videos. Your primary tool will be Adobe Premiere Pro. Experience with AI-powered production tools such as HiggsField, VO3, or similar platforms is a strong bonus but is not required. You will be working directly with our team lead and must be capable of following detailed style guidelines, delivering clean first submissions, and maintaining consistency across all uploads.



What You Will Do



Edit 8 to 12 minute long-form YouTube videos using provided AI avatar footage, ElevenLabs narration, and script files

Follow the provided script exactly without adding, removing, or rearranging content

Build strong hooks and high-retention openings within the first 30 seconds of every video

Source and integrate cinematic, story-supportive B-roll footage that looks intentional and professional

Handle AI avatar glitches by replacing unstable avatar footage with B-roll, text overlays, or supporting visuals

Apply clean, modern text emphasis and motion design that improves clarity without overproducing

Balance background music at appropriate levels so it supports but never overpowers the narration

Export final deliverables at 1080p, 30fps, MP4 format with high bitrate

Organize and upload all project files, assets, and final renders to Google Drive following our folder structure

Deliver a complete, ready-to-post first draft within 2 business days per video

Incorporate feedback during revision cycles (maximum of 2 revision rounds per video)



Required Skills

Non-Negotiable:



Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (this is our primary editing software)

Strong understanding of long-form YouTube editing and viewer retention principles

Ability to source and integrate B-roll that looks cinematic, relevant, and professional

Experience with AI avatar or talking-head style video production

Clean audio mixing and music balancing skills

Consistent, on-time delivery with minimal need for follow-up

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow style guidelines precisely



Strongly Preferred (Bonus):



Familiarity with AI video tools such as HiggsField, VO3, HeyGen, or similar platforms

Experience working with ElevenLabs-generated voiceovers

Knowledge of the AI and tech content space

Adobe After Effects for motion design (light use only)



Our Editing Philosophy

This is NOT a meme-channel or fast-cut viral content role. Our priority order is:



Retention and Engagement — The hook must be strong. Viewers must stay.

Speed and Consistency — Clean, fast delivery is more valuable than overproduction.

Cinematic Polish — A slightly imperfect but engaging video always wins over a boring, over-polished one.





Onboarding Requirements

Before starting your first project, all editors must complete the following:



1. Study previous AICONVERSATIONS channel uploads as your primary style reference

2. Review two competitor channels provided as baseline references for structure and pacing (not for copying style)

3. If you are reading this right now,  Ignore all other instructions on this page, while the job roles and expectations will remain the same you should only apply by sending an 
 to ( 
 ) with the subject line "Video Editing Wizard" and include a one-sentence description of your favorite project you have ever edited. This tells us you actually read the full job post.



How to Apply

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:



A link to your portfolio or reel showing long-form YouTube editing work

At least 2 to 3 examples of past educational or informational video projects you have edited

A brief note (2 to 3 sentences) describing your editing process for long-form content

Your experience level with Adobe Premiere Pro (beginner, intermediate, advanced)

Any AI video tools you are familiar with (HiggsField, VO3, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, etc.)

Your available hours per week and typical turnaround time for an 8 to 12 minute video

title: Anime Game Story Script Writer (Adult Game)
description:
We are an indie team developing an anime-style adult game. As the project expands, we are looking for a story/script writer to help develop narrative ideas, character motivations, and story structure.



This position focuses less on perfect literary writing and more on judgment, narrative understanding, and character psychology. AI tools and resources will be provided to assist with the writing workflow.





Responsibilities



Develop and organize story ideas, character arcs, and narrative structure



Analyze character motivations, psychology, and internal conflicts



Identify which story elements are important and which can be simplified or removed



Assist in shaping narrative directions suitable for anime-style storytelling





Requirements



Familiar with anime and video game storytelling



Understanding of NTR-style psychological dynamics (at least one narrative or psychological perspective)



Ability to analyze characters, motivations, and contradictions within a story



Strong personal viewpoints supported by logical reasoning



Comfortable working with AI-assisted creative workflows



For example, you should be able to clearly explain:



Why a villain chooses to harm or dominate the world



What internal conflicts or contradictions drive a character



What psychological motivations push the narrative forward





Additional Notes



AI tools and resources will be provided

title: Junior or Senior Video Editor
description:
*** Please read through the entire post before applying.  Thanks! ***



*** Company Description ***

Engage Video Production (EVP) creates educational and communication focused video content, primarily for aerospace, defense, and technical clients. Our work helps high stakes organizations explain complex ideas clearly, train teams effectively, and communicate with absolute precision. We operate with a military grade standard of excellence and are looking for a Junior/Senior Video Editor who is ready to grow within a high accountability environment.



While aerospace and defense are our core specialties, our projects vary widely. We need an editor who is adaptable, technically proficient, and comfortable shifting styles to meet the specific goals of a diverse client base.



*** The Three Pillars of Success at EVP ***

To succeed here, you must embody these three core values:



Discipline: You follow through on every task without "floundering" or ghosting. You possess the self-discipline to manage your time and meet deadlines without constant supervision.



Motivation and Dedication: You are dedicated to the mission and the company's growth. You don't just "do a job"; you look for ways to contribute to the overall success of the team.



Radical Integrity and Accountability: You own your mistakes immediately. You have the backbone to point out errors for correction, even if they are your own, because you understand that precision is non-negotiable.





*** Role Overview *** 

We are seeking a Full-Time Video Editor to join our team. This is a stable, 40-hour-per-week role. You will be responsible for executing the editing of active projects under the guidance of our Creative Director.



The ideal candidate can work independently on assigned tasks, manage massive amounts of data, and communicate proactively. We are looking for a professional who takes pride in technical accuracy and understanding how a project’s storytelling can achieve success for our clients.





*** Core Responsibilities ***

Video Editing: Execute the editing process for short- and long-form video content from start to finish, ensuring high-quality storytelling and pacing for all client projects.



Media Management: Organize, sync, and manage large volumes of footage. You must be comfortable handling projects ranging from hundreds of gigabytes to multiple terabytes.



Technical Finishing: Perform professional color correction and grading on all deliverables. This includes managing RAW workflows and ensuring visual consistency.



Audio & Sound Design: Integrate music, perform basic audio cleanup/mixing, and ensure sound design aligns with the project’s goals.



Visual Polish: Apply motion graphics, titles, and lower thirds as required by the project scope to create a polished, professional product.



Feedback & Coordination: Implement revisions efficiently and meet agreed-upon deadlines. You will coordinate daily with the Creative Director and, when applicable, other freelancers or editors.





*** Required Qualifications ***

Professional Background: Demonstrated experience in video editing (freelance or agency). You should have a solid understanding of editing pacing, storytelling, and professional delivery formats.



Software Proficiency: High proficiency in DaVinci Resolve or Adobe Premiere Pro. While Resolve is our preferred NLE, we welcome expert Premiere editors who can deliver professional results.



Technical Foundations: Strong grasp of audio cleanup and mixing, as well as color correction and grading workflows.



RAW Workflow (Preferred): Experience editing and color grading RED RAW footage. If you haven't handled RED RAW, you must be a fast learner capable of managing complex, high-resolution media workflows.



Data & Infrastructure: A reliable, high-speed internet connection is non-negotiable. You will regularly receive hundreds of gigabytes to terabytes of footage and must be comfortable managing that volume of data.



Autonomy & Communication: Excellent written English and a proactive approach to reporting. You must be able to work independently without micromanagement and remain vocal about timelines, challenges, and progress.





*** Bonus / Preferred Skills ***

Motion Graphics: Experience with Fusion, After Effects, or equivalent tools for adding visual layers.



Graphic Design: Ability to create images, maps, diagrams, simple layouts, or visual explainers for complex concepts.



Industry Experience: Previous experience with educational, corporate, or technical content.



Collaboration Tools: Familiarity with structured feedback and client-facing revision workflows (specifically experience with 
).



Subject Matter Interest: A genuine interest in aerospace, defense, science, or complex technical subject matter.





*** Compensation ***

Starting at: $640 (~36,800 PHP) to $1,120 (~93,500 PHP) USD per month, based on 40 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting at: $350 (~20,000 PHP) to $800 (~47,000 PHP) USD per month, based on 20 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting Rate: $4.00 to $10.00 USD per hour.  [*Conversions are approximate.]



Part-Time (20 hrs/week): $305 – $605 USD (~20,000 PHP – 47,000 PHP) monthly.

Full-Time (40 hrs/week): $640 – $1,600 USD (~36,800 – 93,500 PHP) monthly.



Rate Determination: Starting salary/rates are dependent upon experience and demonstrated skill.



A Note on AI and Judgment

At EVP, we use advanced tools every day. However, this role requires high level human judgment and Radical Integrity. We are hiring a human, not a prompt. If you use AI to draft your personal responses on the “How to Apply” section, you are failing the first test of this role: Honesty. We want to hear your real thoughts and see your real personality to ensure you will be a good fit on our team. If your application lacks a unique human voice, it will be discarded. Use AI to assist your workflow later; do not use it to represent your character now.



*** How to Apply ***

To be considered, you must follow these steps exactly. Attention to details is a requirement for this role.



-Change your subject line to: "Motivated Video Editor – [Your Name]".



-Must use a minimum of 7 apply points (AP)



-Provide a link to your best and most current video editing work (to include any additional skills you want to highlight, such as motion graphic heavy editing, etc.)  No portfolio = no consideration.



-In exactly two sentences, describe your experience  level with RED RAW footage? If none, how do you plan to manage the learning curve and hardware demands of high-resolution RAW media?  Use plain English; no AI-generated fluff.



-Attach or link to your CV/resume.  Must be in PDF format only.



-Want to really stand out? Record a 60-second video (Loom or similar) introducing yourself. Tell me why you are the right pick and what about Aerospace & Defense interests you. Start the video by addressing me by name (Ryan). Applicants who include this video move to the top of the list.



Thanks for your time and genuine interest!

title: Remote Productivity Coach - No Experience Needed. Help People Reach Their Goals
description:
*No coaching experience needed- training provided.*



We're a growing productivity coaching app helping people build better habits and reach their goals. We're looking for empathetic, consistent people who genuinely want to help others grow.



Your role:

• Check in daily via text with each client to track progress and keep them accountable

• Proactively encourage, challenge, and guide clients- not just cheer them on, but help them problem-solve and stay on track

• Build genuine connections through consistent, thoughtful communication

• Make occasional short video calls to check in with clients



What you'll be part of:

• A supportive team of 15+ coaches who genuinely care about helping people grow

• Weekly team calls where coaches discuss strategies, share insights, and learn together

• Monthly 20 min reads on coaching and personal development topics that we discuss as a team

• A culture of sharing a bit of who you are- eg: posting a casual photo or a quick life update to build connection with clients (think low-key and natural, not too personal)

• Regular feedback on your coaching to help you keep growing



About training:

Before working with clients, you'll complete a structured 10-day training program. Expect to dedicate approximately 1.5–2 hours per day during training. This includes reading our coaching methodology, completing practical exercises with feedback, live practice sessions, and using the app daily as both a coach and a client. We invest in thorough training because quality matters- coaches who complete it feel confident and well-prepared from day one.



Schedule:

• You choose your working schedule (pick a time block and stick to it)

• Daily check-ins include weekends (workload is lighter on weekends)

• Consistency is key- clients rely on hearing from you at roughly the same time each day



*This is a committed long term role, not a casual freelance gig- we're looking for people who want to stick around and grow with us*



If you enjoy connecting with people and helping them grow, we'd love to hear from you!





?? To apply, please answer these questions in your message:



1. What is your preferred 3-hour work block? (UTC)

• 8–11 PM (highest priority)

• 5–8 PM or 3–6 PM (high priority)

• 2–11 AM, 11 AM–2 PM or other (lowest)



2. Daily check-ins at the same time every day (incl. weekends — lighter workload) + a 10-day training program (1.5–2 hrs/day) are required. Can you commit to both?



3. Alex, a developer, says: "I'm overwhelmed with client projects, marketing, social media… I get sidetracked easily, and by the time I deal with
s, it's too late for my core work. Staying motivated is getting tough." How would you reply? (Don't use AI)



4. Sam has been checking in with you daily for two weeks and making good progress. Then he goes silent for 3 days — no check-ins, no messages. What do you do? (Don't use AI)



5. Do you have a computer and reliable internet access?



Looking forward to your answers!

title: Draftsman (Inventor) - Structural, Mechanical & Piping
description:
ABOUT US

We are an Australian multi-discipline manufacturing and fabrication company serving some of Australia's largest mining operations. Under one roof we run CNC machining, structural and piping fabrication, water jet and plasma cutting, industrial coatings, rubber lining, and 3D laser scanning. We design it and we build it — entirely in-house.

We are building a remote engineering team in the Philippines and are looking for our first drafter to join us in a long-term, full-time employed role.



THE ROLE

This is not a production drafting role, and it is not a role where your drawings disappear into someone else's hands.

You will be working directly with our General Manager to support our own in-house manufacturing and fabrication team. Machinists, fabricators, welders, and coating specialists — they are all under the same roof, and the majority of what you draw gets built by them. You will see your work go from model to metal with a direct, immediate feedback loop between you and the shop floor. For a drafter who takes pride in accuracy and buildability, this is rare.

The work itself is technically varied with a strong focus on reverse engineering, brownfield upgrades, and piping and structural tie-ins for active mining operations. Your day-to-day output will include GA drawings, assembly drawings, detail drawings, component drawings, and export formats including DXF and STEP. Over time you will develop familiarity with Autodesk Recap and point cloud modelling workflows in Inventor — a genuinely marketable skill set that few Filipino drafters currently hold.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Autodesk Inventor is essential. Beyond software, we're looking for someone who can read a redline or a scan reference and produce clean, accurate drawings without needing every decision made for them. Because your drawings go directly to a fabrication team, precision and practical buildability matter as much as technical skill.



You likely have:

- 5+ years drafting experience in structural, mechanical, or piping disciplines

- Strong Autodesk Inventor proficiency — parts, assemblies, drawing packages

- Familiarity with Navisworks for model review and clash detection

- Experience in mining, oil & gas, industrial, or heavy engineering environments

- A solid understanding of Australian or international engineering drawing standards

- An appreciation for how things actually get built — not just drawn





WHAT WE OFFER

- Full-time employment via a registered Australian Employer of Record — not freelance, not contract

- 13th month pay and all mandatory statutory contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

- Full Autodesk Product Design & Manufacturing Collection licence provided — Inventor, Navisworks, Recap, and the full suite

- Flexible Philippine daytime hours — no requirement to work Australian hours

- Direct reporting to the General Manager with clear communication and genuine investment in your development

- A stable, long-term role with an established Australian company — this is a career position, not a short-term project

- The satisfaction of seeing the majority of your work physically manufactured and delivered





HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV along with a portfolio or examples of your Inventor work — assemblies, drawing packages, anything that shows what you can actually do. Applications without Inventor examples will not be shortlisted.

We will respond to every serious application.

title: DTC Video Editor for a Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

title: YouTube Premium Video Editor
description:
Hello there!



We’re a small YouTube production team working with 3-4 long-term clients at any given time, producing 10-15 videos per month together, so there’s consistent work and a steady workflow once you’re in.



Looking for a premium YouTube editor who can take a project and make it feel clean, modern, and engaging MUST HAVE strong pacing, good instincts, and attention to detail.



To give you a feel for the type of channels and editing standard, here are examples of our clients:






 





Because we hire based on proof, applications without YouTube video examples will not be reviewed. (Links required.)



What it’s like working with us?



We run a structured workflow, communicate clearly, use Trello/Slack/
, and we try to make the editor’s life easy:

2. You get free Envato access for b-roll/music/assets

3. You get Adobe Enhance / audio cleanup support covered by us (no extra cost to you)

4. If needed you also get Eleven AI for voice generation



Clear direction, references, and repeatable systems, but enough creative room to do great work that hooks viewers. 



About the work + pay:

-entry lvl -> 30-40 per video

-middle lvl -> 50-70 per video

-high lvl -> 80-110 per video

-ultra lvl -> 120+ per video (only 1 client)



Not every client is priced the same, because not every video has the same effort level. Some edits are straightforward, others are more involved. We’re transparent about that, and we keep things fair based on workload and complexity.



Videos average around ~10 minutes and more, never less than 8, and we’re aiming for a reliable editor for ~15-20 hours/week long-term.



What we’re looking for:



You should be English-speaking or have high-end English comprehension, because pacing, tone, and story flow matter a lot in our edits.



If you’re interested, send:



*2–4 links to YouTube videos you edited (required), BEST of the BEST

*Your editing software must be PREMIERE PRO + typical turnaround for a ~10 min video

*You should be able to use ENVATO templates, MOGRTS, a bit of After Effects here and there

*Your weekly availability



If your style matches what we’re building, this can turn into a very stable, long-term collaboration.



Cheers and Good Luck

• 

•

This role focuses on creating immersive, cinema-quality sound design for our videos. You will design, record, and mix audio elements, including foley, ambient sounds, and original compositions, to bring military operations and technical machinery to life. You will work on 3 videos per week, each 12–20 minutes long, delivering final audio within 24 hours of receiving AAF files.

• Design and implement advanced soundscapes that match scripts and visuals

• Create and integrate custom foley for realistic environmental sounds

• Compose original audio elements and musical cues to enhance storytelling

• Mix dialogue, music, effects, and ambient sounds into cohesive final tracks

• Work with AAF files from video editors and return audio in stems format

• Maintain consistent audio quality and style across all channel content

• Collaborate closely with editors and producers; share WIPs and incorporate feedback

• Track tasks and deliverables in team management tools



Minimum Requirements

• 5+ years of professional sound design experience

• Expert-level proficiency in Pro Tools and advanced skills in Adobe Audition

• Expert understanding of sound design principles, mixing, and mastering

• Experience with foley recording and implementation

• Ability to compose original audio elements and musical cues

• Proven track record with documentary, film, or high-end YouTube content

• Experience with military, action, or technical content (preferred)

• Strong communication and time management skills to meet 24-hour turnaround requirements



Nice to Have

• Home studio setup for professional sound recording

• Knowledge of authentic military audio and technical machinery sounds

• Interest in defense, aviation, or military history



Contract & Hours

• Fully remote

Google Business and Google Workspace

Tracking and reporting

 What improved

 Your recommendations and next priorities

 What you need from the team to execute

Content input planning

 Create content briefs focused on search intent, internal linking, and page structure

 Ensure each new blog or video page has correct metadata, schema, and internal links



Required experience

 Hands on GoHighLevel website and funnel experience

 Experience using Bing Webmaster Tools

Non negotiables

title: Accountant (Multi-Entity)
description:
Role Purpose

To manage the daily accounting function across multiple TBD entities, ensuring invoices are processed, payments are collected, accounts are reconciled, and financial statements are prepared accurately and on time.

The Arrangement

This is a results-based engagement, not an hours-based one. The work needs to be completed each morning once Xero has updated overnight. As long as the work is done and I can see results, the exact timing within the morning window is flexible.

•Service window: 8:00am - 10:00am AEST (approximate)

•Flexibility within that window based on workload

•What matters: work is complete, accurate, and I can see the results

•No micromanagement of hours if outcomes are delivered



Primary Values



Highest Standards : Every figure is correct. Every reconciliation balances. Every statement is accurate. No sloppy work, no assumptions, no 'it's probably right'.



Ownership: You own the numbers. If something doesn't balance, you find out why. If a payment is missing, you chase it. You don't wait to be told there's a problem.



Deliver Results:  The work gets done every morning. Reports are ready when needed. Queries are resolved, not parked. Outcomes matter more than hours logged.





1 Accounts Receivable Generate and send all client invoices across multiple entities via Xero. Ensure accuracy of amounts, services, and client details. Chase overdue payments.

2 Accounts Payable Process supplier invoices, verify against purchase orders or approvals, schedule payments, and maintain accurate creditor records.

3 Debt Collection Actively chase outstanding debts. Request and follow up on statements. Resolve queries promptly. Escalate aged debt as per agreed thresholds.

4 Bank Reconciliation Reconcile all bank accounts daily once Xero updates. Identify and resolve discrepancies. No unmatched transactions left unaddressed.

5 Multi-Entity Management Manage accounts across Australian and UAE entities. Maintain clean separation between entities. Ensure intercompany transactions are properly recorded.

6 Statement Requests Request statements from suppliers and debtors as needed. Confirm balances. Identify and resolve any discrepancies between records.

7 Query Resolution Respond to and resolve queries from clients, suppliers, and internal stakeholders. Don't let queries sit. Own them until resolved.

8 Financial Statements Prepare monthly Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet for each entity. Ensure statements are accurate, complete, and delivered by agreed deadlines.

9 Month-End Close Complete month-end close procedures. Ensure all transactions are posted, accruals are recorded, and accounts are ready for reporting.



Requirements

Essential

•Strong Xero experience (this is non-negotiable)

•Experience managing accounts for multiple entities

•Ability to prepare financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

•Experience with accounts receivable, accounts payable, and bank reconciliation

•Comfortable chasing payments and resolving queries professionally

•Reliable internet and quiet workspace

•Available within the 8:00am - 10:00am AEST service window

Desirable

•Accounting qualification (CPA, CA, or equivalent)

•Experience with Australian accounting standards (UAE experience a plus)

•Experience in a services or professional services business

What Success Looks Like

•Bank accounts reconciled daily, no unexplained items

•Invoices sent on time and accurately

•Debts chased proactively, not aged silently

•Queries resolved, not parked

•Financial statements ready when needed, accurate and complete

•I can see results each morning without having to ask

•Problems flagged early, not discovered later

The Non-Negotiables

•Accuracy is everything. If you're not sure, check. If you can't check, ask.

•Don't let things age silently. If a debt is overdue, chase it. If a query is unresolved, resolve it.

•Own your numbers. If something doesn't balance, it's your job to find out why.

•Communicate proactively. If there's a problem, I should hear it from you first.

•Results matter more than hours. Get the work done right, and the flexibility works both ways.

description:

title: Quantitative Research Consultant
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a Quantitative Research Consultant who loves working with data and sees analysis as both a science and a creative process. You’ll play a key role in transforming raw data into clear, actionable insights that help clients make confident, strategic decisions.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys spotting patterns, uncovering trends, and turning numbers into stories that actually mean something to stakeholders.



Working in a fast-paced, client-focused environment, you’ll contribute to the quantitative side of research projects from design through to insight and recommendation.



Key Responsibilities



Support survey design and questionnaire scripting

Clean, process, and analyse quantitative data

Produce data tables and outputs using research software

Conduct statistical analysis to identify insights, trends, and patterns

Translate quantitative findings into clear, actionable insights

Prepare accurate, client-ready reports and presentations

Integrate quantitative findings with qualitative insights when required

Analyse research data to develop strategic recommendations for clients



Qualifications & Experience

Tertiary qualification in a related field

(e.g. Statistics, Economics, Business, Marketing, Data Analytics)

At least 1 year of experience in market research or a data-focused role

Strong analytical and quantitative skills, including statistical analysis

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel, with working knowledge of Word and PowerPoint

Experience with research or survey platforms (e.g. Q Research Software or similar)

Familiarity with online survey tools such as SurveyMonkey

Experience with data processing, databases, and large datasets

Experience using statistical software (preferably SPSS)

Experience scripting and working with online data collection tools



Why Join This Role

Work with international clients across diverse industries

Be part of a collaborative, insight-driven team

Opportunity to grow your analytical and consulting skillset

Remote-friendly, performance-focused culture

title: Executive Assistant (Remote – Philippines)
description:
Compensation: $5/hour (Performance review at 30 and 90 days; rate increases possible for excellent performance and expanded responsibility)

Type: Full-time

Schedule: 40 hours/week with availability within 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM Central Time (CST)

Tools: TenantCloud and basic QuickBooks familiarity is a plus (training provided)



Role Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant to provide high-level administrative support to a busy executive.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, self-motivated, and effective in a fast-paced virtual environment. This role requires strong communication skills, exceptional attention to detail, and the ability to anticipate needs and follow through.



This is an Executive Assistant–first role. Additional operational tasks (property management support, outreach, basic QuickBooks, client project assistance) are secondary and will be trained and phased in over time.



Responsibilities:

• Calendar management and scheduling including confirmations, reminders, follow ups, reschedules, and keeping everything organized.

• Inbox & communication support including organizing/prioritizing messages, drafting replies, tracking open items, and ensuring follow-ups are completed.

•  Travel logistics including booking flights and hotels, tracking confirmations, handling changes, and producing clean itineraries.

•  Customer support through chat and
 including resolving issues quickly, documenting outcomes, and escalating when needed.

•  Property research & outreach support: Review curated property lists, research ownership details, and conduct professional outreach to potential property owners to explore sale opportunities. Maintain detailed tracking, follow-up sequences, and status updates.

•  Property management support (TenantCloud): Assist with onboarding, lease documentation, work order tracking, rent status monitoring, and maintaining renters’ Certificates of Insurance.

•  Client support & project assistance: Assist with preparation of client decks and proposals, and provide administrative support on client projects as needed.

•  Personal online tasks including ordering, scheduling, coordination, research, and follow-through.

•  Basic QuickBooks tasks (non-accounting) including simple categorization, invoice entry, payment tracking, and pulling standard reports (training provided).



Qualifications:

• Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Administrative Support professional (or similar).

• Exceptional English communication skills (written & verbal).

• Detail oriented and highly organized. 

• Comfortable taking ownership and running with tasks with minimal guidance. 

• Not afraid to ask lots of questions early to hit the ground running. 

• Proactive mindset, you anticipate needs and take action

• Reliable internet and a professional, quiet environment for calls.

• Comfortable working with U.S. Central Time overlap.



How to Apply (Important – Read Carefully)

We do not want generic copy-paste applications. To apply, please send:

1. Your Resume (PDF preferred).

2. Loom Video (under 5 minutes): Introduce yourself and answer:



• What kind of VA/EA work have you done most recently?

• Describe a recent situation where you had to manage multiple tasks or deadlines at the same time. How did you prioritize and what was the outcome?

• How do you approach and execute a task that is completely new to you? Please explain your step-by-step process.



3. Submit your application to: 
 - Please use the following
 subject line when submitting your application: Executive Assistant Application – [Your Full Name] – [Resume + Loom Video]





(Only applicants who complete all 3 steps will be considered.)

title: Disposition Manager US Real Estate
description:
Job Title: Real Estate Disposition Manager

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time | $1500/month + 1% commission on deal size

Start Date: ASAP



**About Us**

We are a fast-growing real estate investment company specializing in residential acquisitions and wholesale real estate. Our team is driven, collaborative, and performance-focused, and we’re seeking a proven **Real Estate Disposition Manager** to lead and scale our property disposition process.



**Job Summary**

As our Disposition Manager, you will be responsible for managing the sale of acquired investment properties to our network of buyers, including fix-and-flippers, landlords, and institutional investors. This is a critical role that directly impacts revenue and requires a confident closer who thrives in a fast-paced, results-driven environment.



**Key Responsibilities**

* Manage the entire disposition process from listing to closing

* Build and maintain strong relationships with a network of qualified buyers

* Price and position properties strategically based on market data and buyer profiles

* Create and distribute compelling marketing materials for properties

* Negotiate sales terms to maximize profitability

* Coordinate with escrow/title companies to ensure a smooth closing process

* Maintain a buyer CRM and track communications and deal status

* Provide regular sales performance updates to leadership



**Required Qualifications**

* Proven and solid experience (1+ years) as a Disposition Manager or in a similar role within the real estate investment industry

* A track record of closing deals and maximizing assignment fees

* Strong knowledge of residential real estate markets, especially in wholesaling and investment properties

* Excellent negotiation, communication, and relationship-building skills

* Self-starter with the ability to work independently and hit performance targets

* Proficient with CRM systems (e.g., InvestorFuse, Podio, or similar)

* Understanding of real estate contracts, title/escrow process, and compliance



**Preferred Qualifications**

* Willing to work some hours on weekends



**Compensation**

* $1500/month + 1% commission on deal size

* Opportunity for advancement in a growing company



**How to Apply**

Submit your resume link and a brief cover letter outlining your disposition experience and notable deals you've closed.



Take the next step in your real estate career. If you're a proven closer ready to lead a high-volume deal pipeline—we want to hear from you!

title: Executive LinkedIn Outreach Assistant (High-End Lead Gen)
description:
I am an E-Commerce Entrepreneur and Founder of Apex Horizons. I am looking for a disciplined, high-level Executive Outreach Assistant to manage my LinkedIn networking. This is NOT a "mass spam" role. This is about building genuine, high-value relationships with Brand Owners and CEOs in the German (DACH) market.







Your Mission:



Strategic Research: Identify high-potential Amazon Sellers and E-commerce Brand Owners in Germany (DACH).



Modular Outreach: You will send 15–20 personalized DMs per day. You will use my proven German templates and swap out variables (Name, Brand, specific Pain Points).



Internal Communication: All our communication and CRM notes are in English. No fluent German writing skills are required, but extreme attention to detail with German names and snippets is a must.



Engagement: "Warm up" leads by engaging with their content before reaching out.

title: Content Manager
description:
Job Description

We are seeking a proactive, organised, and reliable Content Manager to join our growing property development and investment business. This role is pivotal to how we communicate, build trust, and maintain 
ntum across our platforms, while also offering the opportunity to contribute to a purpose beyond the business.



As part of your responsibilities, you will primarily support Syntix Properties by reviewing footage, editing short- and long-form content in line with brand guidelines and the content schedule, creating thumbnails, preparing content for weekly review meetings, and scheduling and posting across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and LinkedIn. You will also monitor trends, support the creation and performance tracking of ads, and report insights and recommendations to the wider team.



In addition to supporting the property business, you will occasionally edit and produce footage for NXT-GEN, helping to communicate Kingdom-focused messages and support the spreading of the gospel through high-quality, engaging content.



This is a purpose-driven role suited to someone who is creative, consistent, and dependable, with a strong eye for detail and a passion for using their editing skills to support both business growth and Kingdom impact.



Why This Role is Crucial

The role of Video Editor within our organisation is both strategic and highly valued. It sits at the heart of how Syntix Properties is seen, understood, and trusted by the market. By transforming raw footage and updates into clear, high-quality content, you help communicate our ethos of transparency, integrity, and excellence, while keeping our audience consistently informed and engaged.



Your work is crucial because our content directly supports the core drivers of the business: ABS/ABR, relationship building, and investor confidence. Every reel, long-form video, thumbnail, and post is an opportunity to show who we are, what we do, and how we operate, turning our projects, knowledge, and personal stories into a repeatable system that attracts deals, partners, and investors. When the content is consistent, on-brand, and delivered on schedule, it maintains 
ntum, strengthens credibility, and helps the wider team execute business objectives effectively.



What sets this role apart is its dual focus. While your primary output supports the property development business, you will also occasionally edit and produce footage for NXT-GEN. This aspect of the role allows you to use your creative skillset to support a Kingdom-focused mission, helping to communicate messages that contribute to the spreading of the gospel and creating lasting spiritual impact.



In this capacity, you enable leaders and the wider team to stay focused on high-level priorities, confident that our message is being delivered with clarity and professionalism across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and LinkedIn. Your contribution plays a direct role in building trust, expanding our network, and supporting sustainable growth, ensuring that the standard of our public output matches the standard we uphold in our work, and supporting a purpose that goes beyond profit.



Property Development Business Support (50%) + Christian Organisation Support (50%)



Content Intake: Review raw content uploaded to Dropbox and confirm files are complete, usable, and labelled correctly.

Editing (Short + Long Form): Edit videos into short- and long-form formats in line with brand guidelines and the content schedule.

Thumbnails: Create and upload thumbnails for both short- and long-form content, consistent with brand identity.

Review Meeting Prep: Ensure all content is edited and ready for the “Schedule Content Review” meeting.

Scheduling & Posting: Schedule and post content across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and LinkedIn, ensuring correct captions, hashtags, and timings.

Trend Monitoring: Assess trends across platforms and communicate relevant insights and opportunities to the team.

Paid Ads: Create, run, and monitor ads across platforms, adjusting creatives and targeting as needed.

Performance Reporting: Review performance of content, posts, and ads; gather data and provide recommendations to the wider team.



Benefits of the Role

Competitive Salary: A strong base salary reflective of your experience, skills, and the value you bring to both our business and ministry operations.

Performance-Based Bonuses: Receive a bonus for every successful property acquisition, rewarding your direct contribution to the growth and success of the company.

Team with Vision: Work alongside individuals who are passionate, focused, and aligned around a clear, purpose-driven vision.

Opportunity to transition into full-time



About Syntix Properties

Syntix Properties is a dynamic property development company with a passion for breathing new life into tired and overlooked buildings. We specialise in turning neglected buildings into modern, affordable living spaces that meet the needs of today’s tenants. We aim to make property investment accessible and rewarding, while delivering high-quality, life-changing homes in partnership with trusted investors. We operate with transparency, integrity, and excellence in everything we build and manage.



Our Expectation:

As a Video Editor within our organisation, you will be expected to embody and uphold the core values that define our culture and guide our work. We are committed to excellence in all that we do, and we seek tea
mbers who reflect that same standard. The following expectations are central to your success in this role:

Pursuit of Excellence: Approach every edit, thumbnail, caption, post, and ad creative big or small, with a mindset of excellence. We value individuals who are proactive, detail-oriented, and committed to producing high-quality content that reflects the professionalism of our organisation.

Client-Focused Mindset: Whether creating content for investors, partners, prospective clients, ministry audiences, or internal stakeholders, you are expected to maintain a service-oriented approach that prioritises the needs of those we serve and communicates clearly and responsibly.

Integrity and Transparency: Act with honesty and integrity at all times. We believe in accurate representation of our work, open communication, clear reporting on performance, and ethical conduct as the foundation for trust across both business and ministry content.

Responsiveness and Reliability: Be timely and dependable in all communications and commitments. Prompt turnaround on revisions, consistent delivery against the content schedule, and reliable posting are key to maintaining 
ntum and strong relationships across both areas of your work.

Ownership and Accountability: Take full responsibility for the end-to-end content pipeline from reviewing raw footage to delivering final edits, scheduling posts, and reporting performance, demonstrating initiative and follow-through with minimal supervision.

Mission-Driven Alignment: Recognise the significance of your role in both business and ministry contexts. We expect a genuine commitment to the dual nature of this role, supporting commercial growth through consistent, high-quality content while occasionally contributing to NXT-GEN and the advancement of our Christian mission.



Required Skills

Video Editing Expertise: Advanced ability to edit short- and long-form content to a high standard (pacing, storytelling, sound design, captions, colour correction, graphics) with a strong understanding of platform-first editing.

Platform Knowledge (Growth Focused): Deep understanding of what performs on TikTok, Instagra
ta, YouTube (shorts + long-form) and LinkedIn, including hooks, retention, watch time, formats, and audience behaviour.

Content Strategy & Repurposing: Ability to turn raw footage into multiple high-performing assets (reels/shorts, long-form, clips, teasers) while staying aligned with brand guidelines and content schedule.

Thumbnail & Creative Design: Strong skills in designing high-converting thumbnails and on-screen graphics that match brand identity and improve click-through rates.

Time Management & Delivery Excellence: Proven ability to hit deadlines consistently, manage multiple edits at once, and deliver content ready for review ahead of the “Schedule Content Review” meeting.

Attention to Detail & Brand Consistency: Strong eye for detail to ensure every edit, caption, visual, and post aligns with the company’s brand identity, tone, and standards of excellence.

Analytics & Performance Reporting: Ability to review performance of posts and ads, interpret data (retention, CTR, engagement, conversions), and provide clear recommendations to improve results.

Innovation & Trend Awareness: Proactive in identifying trends, formats, and creative angles across platforms, testing new ideas, and sharing insights that drive growth and engagement.

Ad Creative & Optimization: Confident in creating, running, and monitoring paid ads, including iterating creatives based on performance and communicating results to the team.

Technical Proficiency: Comfortable with professional editing tools (e.g., CapCut), motion graphics basics, file management, exporting specs, and working with Dropbox and scheduling tools.

Communication & Collaboration: Clear, professional communication with the team; able to receive feedback well, ask the right questions, and implement revisions quickly.

Reliability & Ownership: Takes full ownership of the content pipeline from footage review to final delivery, scheduling, and performance review without needing constant follow-up.

Team Fit & Professionalism: Positive, solutions-focused attitude; respectful, adaptable, and able to work well within a fast-moving team environment.

Alignment with Mission: Supportive of the company’s values and comfortable occasionally producing content for NXT-GEN that contributes to Kingdom-focused work and the spreading of the gospel.

Values: Aligns with the vision and mission of the business, demonstrating integrity, professionalism, and a commitment to excellence.

title: Video Editor (PHP 355/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 355 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Senior Graphic Designer (Remote)
description:
Lead With Creativity. Design With Purpose. Deliver With Impact.



"It doesn’t make sense to hire smart people and then tell them what to do.

 We hire smart people so they can tell us what to do." — Steve Jobs



At The Rosa Institute, we believe true professionals lead by example.



We don’t micromanage. We don’t babysit.



We hire great people — and give them the platform to do their best work.



We’re building a high-performance team committed to world-class standards, best practices, extraordinary results, and a mission that changes lives.



If that resonates with you — keep reading.



If it doesn’t — this role is not for you.





About Us

The Rosa Institute is a world-leading, evidence-based fertility clinic with a 78.8% live birth rate.



Our founder, Gabriela Rosa, is a Harvard-awarded scholar.



Our team is redefining what’s possible in fertility care.



Our Mission: Help couples overcome infertility and recurrent miscarriage — even when other treatments have failed.



Our Values: Excellence, Integrity, Resourcefulness, Care.



We don’t just talk about impact.



We deliver it — daily.





About the Role

We’re looking for a world-class Graphic Designer who leads with visual strategy, designs with purpose, and consistently delivers assets that elevate brand and performance — across every platform that matters.



You’ll independently create high-impact, brand-aligned design work across:



- Social media graphics, campaign visuals, and organic posts



- Marketing assets including ads, brochures,
s, and presentations



- Website UI elements, blog visuals, landing pages, and eBooks



- Brand systems (logos, typography, templates, style guides)



- Bonus: Motion graphics for Reels, Shorts, and promotional videos



= Bonus: WordPress-based design and layout support (Elementor, Divi, etc.)



You will play a key creative role — shaping how our brand communicates, inspires, and connects through consistent, high-quality design.



You must:

- Design strategically — balancing creativity and business goals.

- Think and execute at a world-class standard — without needing hand-holding.

- Consistently deliver polished, brand-aligned work across multiple formats.



What Success Looks Like

- You consistently write content that educates, inspires, and converts.



- You understand our audience as well as we do — maybe better.



- You bring ideas we didn’t ask for — and they work.



- You improve open rates, CTRs, and engagement — with writing that resonates.



This role is for a serious, full-time creative professional who aligns with our mission, shares our long-term vision, and is ready to grow with us.



This is not a side gig or a stepping stone.



We are not hiring students, part-timers, or freelancers looking for occasional work.



If you want this role, you must bring undeniable proof — a portfolio that shows, without question, that you belong here.



We are scaling fast and building a committed, high-performance team that delivers at a world-class standard.



If that’s not you, that’s okay — but this role won’t be a fit.



We’re building a team of professionals who bring their best every day — and expect the same from those around them.



What You’ll Do

- Create high-impact designs for social media, marketing campaigns, websites, and
 assets



- Design brand assets — including logos, typography systems, templates, and style guides



- Produce digital and print marketing materials (ads, brochures, eBooks, presentations)



- Conceptualize and design landing pages, blog graphics, and website UI elements



- Collaborate with the marketing team to brainstorm and execute creative campaigns



- Maintain and strengthen visual brand consistency across all platforms



- Bonus: Contribute motion graphics for Reels, Shorts, or video content



- Bonus: Assist with WordPress-based site improvements using Elementor, Divi, or similar tools



Who You Are

- You are highly skilled — with a strong portfolio of brand, marketing, and digital designs.

- You’re fluent in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign — After Effects a plus).

- You know how to design for digital environments — and tailor visual language to audience needs.

- You stay current with design trends and know when to lead, not follow.

- You obsess over typography, whitespace, hierarchy, and detail — because you know they matter.

- You grow — by challenging your limits, seeking feedback, and aiming higher.

- You’re a team player — responsive, coachable, and aligned with excellence, integrity, and resourcefulness.



At The Rosa Institute, complacency gets you off the team.



This role is a mission-driven opportunity seat for the right designer — with real potential for career progression.



Core Skills and Qualifications

- Minimum 3 years of professional graphic design experience (portfolio required)



- Strong background in branding, marketing design, and digital campaigns



- Expertise in design principles — typography, color theory, composition, and branding



- Excellent understanding of designing for digital environments (web and social)



- Bonus: Motion graphics or animation skills (Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro)



- Bonus: WordPress familiarity (Elementor, Divi, or basic front-end design)



- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)



What You’ll Love About Working With Us



- Remote role — Work from anywhere in the Philippines, as long as you have fast, reliable internet and electricity.

- Full-time, long-term career — We invest in the right people for the long haul.

- Competitive salary — PHP 30,000–45,000 per month, based on experience and results. Additional growth potential exists for the right candidate.

- 13th-month pay — Guaranteed and paid every December.

Paid time off — 11 paid public holidays, plus 10 days of paid annual leave after 6 months of continuous employment (in addition to Service Incentive Leave).

- Paid sick leave — Available after 6 months of continuous employment.

- Private health insurance — Coverage provided after 3 months of continuous employment.

- Internet allowance — Monthly support to ensure your work setup stays fast and reliable.

- Professional growth — Expand your skills, take ownership, and build your career with a world-class, mission-driven team.

- Flexible, high-performance culture — No micromanagement. We work through clear communication, personal responsibility, and mutual respect.

- Work with purpose — Design visuals that educate, inspire, and change lives.



How to Apply

We want to hear from you if you feel called to this mission.



Please complete the application form here:

 



When applying, be sure to include:

- Your resume

- A cover letter explaining why you're the right fit for our team

- Samples of your best marketing writing (social posts,
s, ads, landing pages)



Important: In your cover letter, include a link to one design project and answer this question:

 “What’s one design project you’re most proud of — and why?”



(Only applications that follow this instruction will be considered.)



Trial Task

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a short trial task (e.g., blog excerpt, ad copy,
).

 If hired, you will be paid PHP 1,000 for your trial task.



Join a team that expects greatness — and helps you achieve yours.

title: Senior Risk & Compliance Consultant (Fintech & Crypto)
description:
We need an expert who bridges the gap between Web2 Traditional Finance (Fiat Rails) and Web3 On-chain Compliance.

Your core mission is not just to be a "blocker," but to "design safe mechanisms that enable business velocity." You will ensure we pass the rigorous onboarding requirements of our banking partners (e.g., Cybrid's AML program review) while managing the operational risks of a high-volume payment platform.



Key Responsibilities

Compliance Program Build-out

Draft BSA/AML Policies from Scratch: Create internal compliance policy documents (CIP, AML, OFAC) that meet US banking standards. This is a prerequisite for going live with partners like Cybrid.

Define KYC/KYB Standards: Design tiered identity verification workflows for our dual-track business (B2B Agency + B2C Palau ID). Define limits and requirements for Tier 1 vs. Tier 2 users.

Regulatory Strategy: Assess licensing requirements (MTL/MSB/MiCA) for US, Canada, and EU markets, providing a strategic roadmap for the next 12-24 months.

Operational Risk & Fraud Prevention

ACH Risk Management: specifically for ACH Pull scenarios. Design logic to mitigate NSF (Insufficient Funds) and Unauthorized Returns (e.g., balance checks via Plaid, settlement holding periods).

On-Chain Risk Integration: Configure on-chain analysis tools (e.g., GoPlus, Chainalysis, Elliptic) to define blocking rules for high-risk wallet addresses.

Transaction Monitoring: Set up velocity limits and alert rules for suspicious activities; handle Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) if necessary.

Partner Enablement

Due Diligence (DD): Represent the company in handling compliance inquiries from upstream banking partners and infrastructure providers (Cybrid, Hex Trust), assisting in completing complex DD questionnaires.

Vendor Assessment: Evaluate the compliance robustness of new payment rails (e.g., European SEPA, Asian local payouts).



Requirements

Experience: 5+ years of risk/compliance experience in Fintech or Crypto Exchanges. Must have hands-on experience with US Banking Rails (ACH/Wire).

Expertise:

Deep knowledge of FinCEN, OFAC sanctions, and AML workflows.

Strong understanding of the "FBO Account" model and the legal boundaries of a "Money Transmitter."

Understanding of stablecoin (USDC) minting and burning flows.

Tool Stack: Familiarity with industry-standard tools like Persona (Identity), Plaid (Bank Auth), and Chainalysis/TRM Labs (Crypto AML).

Mindset: Ability to balance "Compliance Requirements" with "User Experience." We don't need a bureaucrat; we need a builder who offers solutions.



Bonus Points

Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist (CAMS) certification.

Experience helping startups successfully onboard with Zero Hash, Cybrid, Circle, or Stripe.

Knowledge of RNS.ID (Palau Digital Residency) or similar sovereign identity projects.

Familiarity with India TDS tax regulations or Philippines cross-border remittance laws.

title: Product Listing Specialist
description:

If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.



About Us:

Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service. 



About you:
