title: CHURCH NONPROFIT — PAID TRAINING OPPORTUNITY (SELECTIVE / REMOTE)
description:
To apply, send your resume via WhatsApp: 
We are a church nonprofit building a serious training-and-selection pipeline for future long-term support work.



We are looking for a college graduate tutor, or someone with a strong academic background even without a degree, who is highly studious, intelligent, disciplined, a quick learner, and an excellent communicator that can help our disabled students.



This is a structured paid training opportunity for applicants who can study assigned topics carefully, follow instructions closely, communicate clearly on WhatsApp, submit daily progress reports, and produce strong written and presentation-based work over time.



Participants will be given guided study topics, tools, and clear output expectations. They will be evaluated on how well they understand the material, organize their thinking, communicate progress, and turn what they learn into useful work that supports our nonprofit mission.



We are testing your consistency, skill, work ethic, communication, and character. If you are academically strong, smart, hardworking, and dependable, you may be a good fit. But academic ability alone is not enough. Without good moral values, honesty, and strong character, this opportunity will not work well.



This opportunity is best suited for people who genuinely enjoy learning, love to study, and want to develop their skills while making a meaningful contribution to nonprofit and charitable work.



If a strong working relationship is established through consistency, honesty, communication, and trust, this may lead to ongoing paid work within our church nonprofit initiative.



Please apply only if you are serious and genuinely fit the standard described below.







THE PURPOSE



Our nonprofit needs dependable people who can:

	•	study carefully and learn quickly

	•	write clearly and think in an organized way

	•	communicate updates responsibly on WhatsApp

	•	produce useful essays and presentations

	•	stay disciplined and reliable under pressure

	•	demonstrate honesty, maturity, and good moral character



This training program is designed to evaluate:

	•	writing and research ability

	•	presentation quality

	•	discipline and consistency

	•	speed, focus, and follow-through

	•	communication and responsiveness

	•	integrity and accountability

	•	professionalism and trustworthiness



We are looking for both skill and character.







WHAT STRONG PERFORMANCE CAN LEAD TO



Applicants who perform well may be invited into ongoing paid support work for our church nonprofit initiative.



We continue only with people who demonstrate:

	•	consistency across multiple weeks

	•	honesty and originality

	•	strong communication

	•	dependable output quality

	•	professional attitude

	•	trustworthiness and good judgment



The goal is to identify individuals who can support the mission long term.







PAY AND STRUCTURE



Per Program Offer

	•	?4,500 per program

	•	15 structured modules per program

	•	8-week session

	•	Self-paced and competency-based

	•	Strong applicants may finish in about 7 weeks

	•	Main deliverables for every module:

	•	APA-style essay

	•	PowerPoint presentation with speaker notes



“Per program” means you choose one track and complete the full set of required modules and deliverables for that track.



Because this is self-paced and competency-based, applicants with stronger academic foundations, better writing ability, better discipline, and better prior knowledge may move faster.



Speed matters. Quality matters. Consistency matters.







HOW THE TRAINING MODEL WORKS



Each program is built around guided training modules with structured topics, writing tasks, and presentation assignments.



The focus is on helping participants:

	•	study key subject areas carefully

	•	strengthen writing and presentation skill

	•	organize ideas clearly

	•	communicate progress consistently

	•	apply what they learn through useful written and presentation-based work for our nonprofit



This is a performance-based training and evaluation model designed for serious applicants with strong academic ability, dependable communication, and good moral character.







SELF-PACED / COMPETENCY-BASED MODEL



This program is designed to make use of your prior knowledge, academic strengths, discipline, and ability to learn independently.



You move forward by demonstrating mastery through your output.

Your progress depends on how well and how consistently you complete the required work.



Strong applicants who already have knowledge or experience may complete modules faster.







INTEGRITY AND ORIGINALITY (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

	•	You must submit your own original work

	•	AI tools may be used for support only, such as:

	•	brainstorming

	•	outlining

	•	grammar support

	•	slide drafting assistance

	•	You may not submit copied, borrowed, plagiarized, or misrepresented work

	•	Originality checks are used

	•	Sources must be cited properly in APA style

	•	In-text citations and references must be included where needed



If originality fails, or citations are missing where required, the module will not count as complete until corrected.





HOW EACH MODULE WORKS



Each of the 15 modules includes required milestones.



A module is considered complete only when all required items are finished.



REQUIRED MODULE MILESTONES

	1.	Outline / plan submitted

Short essay outline plus presentation plan

	2.	APA-style essay submitted

Original writing that shows understanding of the topic

	3.	APA citations completed correctly

In-text citations and references where needed

	4.	PowerPoint submitted with speaker notes

Organized, readable, professional, and clearly explained

	5.	Originality review passed



You repeat this process module by module until Module 15.



FINAL REQUIREMENT



Module 15 is the capstone.

The capstone includes a larger final APA paper and a final presentation deck with speaker notes showing overall understanding, communication skill, and ability to apply what was learned.







TARGET PACE FOR STRONG APPLICANTS



To complete 15 modules in about 7 weeks, the expected pace is:

	•	Week 1: 2 modules completed

	•	Week 2: 4 modules completed total

	•	Week 3: 6 modules completed total

	•	Week 4: 8 modules completed total

	•	Week 5: 11 modules completed total

	•	Week 6: 13 modules completed total

	•	Week 7: 15 modules completed total, including capstone



If you fall behind, you will be expected to catch up.

Consistency is part of the evaluation.







PROGRAM TRACKS



Choose one program per application.

Each program contains 15 structured training modules.



PROGRAM A — CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND COMMUNITY SAFETY

	1.	Justice Systems and Institutions

	2.	Courts, Case Flow, and Decision Points

	3.	Criminal Law Foundations

	4.	Crime Theories: Punishment, Prevention, and Deterrence

	5.	Criminology Through a Sociology Lens

	6.	Criminology Through a Psychology Lens

	7.	Corrections and Rehabilitation

	8.	Investigation Basics and Evidence Concepts

	9.	Social Justice, Equity, and System Impact

	10.	Media and Public Perception of Crime

	11.	Economic and Social Reactions to Crime

	12.	Bias, Group Dynamics, and Social Attitudes

	13.	Culture, Community Factors, and Social Change

	14.	Security, Homeland, and Private Security Concepts: Boundaries and Ethics

	15.	Capstone: Community Safety Improvement Plan



PROGRAM B — HEALTHCARE ADMINISTRATION AND COMMUNITY HEALTH PRACTICE

	1.	Healthcare Systems Overview

	2.	Healthcare Policy Basics

	3.	Healthcare Management Fundamentals

	4.	Healthcare Finance Basics

	5.	Ethics and Legal Issues in Healthcare

	6.	Quality Improvement and Performance

	7.	Healthcare Information Systems

	8.	Community Health Assessment

	9.	Program Planning and Education Strategy

	10.	Chronic Disease Prevention Program Design

	11.	Injury and Illness Prevention Program Design

	12.	Health Literacy and Communication

	13.	Evaluating Program Effectiveness

	14.	Practicum Project: Proposal and Evaluation Plan

	15.	Capstone: Community Health Program Pitch



PROGRAM C — NURSING, HEALTH PROMOTION, AND COMMUNITY CARE

	1.	Healthy Communities and Prevention

	2.	Comprehensive Health Assessment

	3.	Holistic Assessment Practice

	4.	Professional Nursing Concepts

	5.	Transcultural and Community Care

	6.	Global Health and Humanitarian Response

	7.	Health Policy and Systems

	8.	Evidence-Based Practice and Applied Research

	9.	Leadership and Management in Healthcare

	10.	Healthcare Ethics and the Law

	11.	Integrated Care Practice

	12.	Health Promotion Strategies

	13.	Patient Education and Communication

	14.	Care Planning and Community Support

	15.	Capstone: Community Health Nursing Support Presentation



PROGRAM D — UNITED STATES STUDIES: HISTORY, CULTURE, SOCIETY, AND CIVIC ANALYSIS

	1.	Foundations of the American Experience

	2.	U.S. Identity, Culture, and National Narratives

	3.	Class, Race, Ethnicity, Religion, Gender, and Region in American Life

	4.	American Institutions, Power, and Civic Structures

	5.	Local History, Community Memory, and Place

	6.	Oral History and Personal Narrative in the U.S. Experience

	7.	Conflict, Violence, and Social Tension in American Society

	8.	Cold War America and Its Cultural Impact

	9.	The American South: History, Culture, and Social Change

	10.	Material Culture, Memory, and Meaning in the United States

	11.	Public Memory, Death, and Cultural Identity in America

	12.	War, Service, Sacrifice, and Historical Records in U.S. Society

	13.	Media, Technology, and Social Media in American Culture

	14.	Sex, Gender, and Inequality in American Society

	15.	Capstone: U.S. Society and Culture Analysis Project







WHO SHOULD APPLY



You must have a college degree.

If you do not have a college degree, you must have a strong academic background that clearly shows you can handle serious reading, writing, research, structured thinking, and disciplined independent study.



Apart from academic ability, you must also be:

	•	smart and truly studious

	•	a quick learner

	•	strong in writing and organized thinking

	•	highly communicative and easy to work with on WhatsApp

	•	able to provide daily reporting and progress updates

	•	dependable, accountable, and responsive

	•	respectful, honest, and of good moral character

	•	able to work under pressure at a fast pace

	•	capable of producing clean, professional PowerPoint presentations with speaker notes



This opportunity depends on all of the above.

Please apply only if you genuinely meet this standard.





HOW TO APPLY



Send via WhatsApp: 
Please send all of the following:

	1.	Resume

	2.	Full name + timezone

	3.	Daily availability (hours per day)

	4.	Program choice (A, B, C, or D)

	5.	Writing sample: 1 to 2 pages of APA-style writing

	6.	PowerPoint sample: 5 to 10 slides with speaker notes

	7.	Confirmation statement:

“I understand originality checks are used. AI support is allowed for assistance only. I will submit only original work I create and will include proper citations where needed.”



Applicants will be reviewed based on seriousness, communication, and demonstrated skill.



Qualified applicants should be prepared for a phone interview.

Please read the full post carefully before asking questions already answered here.







Here is a shorter OnlineJobs version too:



CHURCH NONPROFIT — PAID TRAINING OPPORTUNITY (SELECTIVE / REMOTE)



We are a church nonprofit seeking a highly studious, intelligent, disciplined applicant for a structured paid training opportunity that may lead to ongoing paid work.



You must have a college degree, or a strong academic background if you do not hold a degree.



We are looking for someone who is:

	•	academically strongl

	•	smart and truly studious

	•	a quick learner

	•	strong in writing and organized thinking

	•	highly communicative on WhatsApp

	•	able to submit daily progress reports

	•	dependable, responsive, and hardworking

	•	honest and of good moral character



Pay: 4,500 per program

Structure: 15 guided modules per program

Session: 8 weeks, self-paced and competency-based

Deliverables for every module:

	•	APA-style essay

	•	PowerPoint presentation with speaker notes



Program Tracks:

A. Criminal Justice and Community Safety

B. Healthcare Administration and Community Health Practice

C. Nursing, Health Promotion, and Community Care

D. United States Studies: History, Culture, Society, and Civic Analysis



To apply, send all of the following via WhatsApp: 
•	Resume

	•	Full name + timezone

	•	Daily availability

	•	Program choice

	•	1 to 2 pages of APA-style writing

	•	5 to 10 slide PowerPoint sample with speaker notes

	•	Confirmation that you submit only original work and use proper citations



This opportunity is best for people who genuinely enjoy learning, love to study, and want to develop their skills while contributing meaningfully to nonprofit and charitable work.

title: Payroll & Financial Reporting Officer (Australia)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Payroll & Financial Reporting Officer to support payroll processing and financial reporting across our childcare group. This role is suited to someone with strong payroll compliance knowledge, solid accounting and bookkeeping skills, and experience working across multiple entities.



The position manages payroll using Employment Hero and supports financial reporting in Xero, including BAS, GST reconciliation, intercompany bookkeeping, billing, and wages reporting.



Skills & Requirements

• Strong experience in end-to-end payroll processing.

• Strong knowledge of Australian payroll legislation, awards, and compliance requirements.

• Experience with ATO submissions related to payroll.

• Strong accounting and bookkeeping knowledge.

• BAS and GST reconciliation experience for group accounts (mandatory).

• Experience with intercompany bookkeeping and multi-entity reporting.

• Intermediate to advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivots, reconciliations).

• High attention to detail and accuracy.

• Experience with Employment Hero (Payroll) and Xero (Financial Reporting).

• Strong time management and communication skills.





Key Responsibilities



Payroll Processing (Employment Hero)

• Prepare and process end-to-end payroll for all staff within set deadlines.

• Manage payroll adjustments, corrections, and payroll-related enquiries.

• Ensure accurate calculation of wages, leave, allowances, and deductions.

• Maintain accurate payroll records in line with awards and legislation.



Payroll Compliance & ATO Submissions

• Ensure compliance with Australian payroll legislation, awards, and Fair Work requirements.

• Prepare and support ATO submissions related to payroll.

• Assist with payroll audits and compliance reviews as required.



Superannuation & Payroll Tax

• Process superannuation contributions accurately and on time.

• Prepare monthly payroll tax calculations and assist with lodgements.

• Reconcile payroll tax across entities and reporting periods.



Financial Reporting & Bookkeeping (Xero)

• Support financial reporting using Xero.

• Assist with BAS preparation and GST reconciliation for a group of entities (mandatory).

• Maintain accurate bookkeeping records across multiple entities.

• Support fortnightly bookkeeping and reconciliations.



Intercompany Bookkeeping & Billing

• Manage intercompany bookkeeping for staff costs, agency costs, and shared expenses.

• Record casual staff costs and agency costs to correct intercompany accounts.

• Maintain accurate intercompany journals, balances, and reconciliations.

• Support intercompany billing and complex cost allocations.



Wages, P&L & Management Reporting

• Prepare wages reports for management and finance teams.

• Support P&L and wages analysis across centres and entities.

• Assist with internal reporting to support budgeting and cost control.



Agency Invoicing

• Match agency invoices against approved timesheets and rates.

• Liaise with agencies to resolve discrepancies.



The role may transition to a full-time position, subject to performance, adherence to rostered hours, and maintaining 100% attendance.



The working days are Monday to Wednesday, from 9:00 am to 2:00 pm Sydney time (6:00 am to 11:00 am Philippine time). This may change in case the client asks you to come in on some other days or extend your working hours.



We are seeking someone with sound knowledge of Australian bookkeeping who can work independently and learn at their own pace. Video training materials and SOPs will be provided. You can always check in with the finance manager if you have any questions or require clarification regarding your work.

title: Virtual Assistant — AI Marketing Business
description:
Virtual Assistant — AI Marketing Business

Part-time to Full-time  |  Remote  |  Brisbane, Australia (Owner)  |  



READ THIS WHOLE AD BEFORE APPLYING. There is a specific application instruction at the bottom. Anyone who does not follow it will not be considered. This is a test of attention to detail — the most important skill for this role.



WHO WE ARE



My name is Matt Elliott. I'm based in Brisbane, Australia, and I run a growing AI-powered network marketing business built around my book "AI Powered Network Marketing."



Here's what that actually means day to day:



• I sell a physical book ($67, free shipping) and digital training products online

• I run a network marketing business under the ASEA brand with a team of 300+ members

• I'm building two members area platforms with training videos, community, and tools

• I use AI automation (an AI assistant called Aria) to handle prospecting and lead conversations

• I create daily video content — diary-style videos, training content, and short-form social posts

• I'm running a 90-day growth campaign right now across TikTok,
, Instagram, YouTube, and



This business is built on the idea that AI handles the systems and humans focus on relationships. I practice what I preach — which means I use AI tools everywhere, including to help train and support my VA.



I'm looking for one person to grow with me as this business scales. This is not a task-and-forget role. This is a front-row seat to watching an AI-powered online business get built from the ground up.



THE ROLE



This starts as a part-time position — roughly 3-4 hours per day — while I train you on the systems and tools. After 1-2 weeks it becomes full-time (7-8 hours per day) once you know the workflow.



You won't be thrown in the deep end. You'll learn one task at a time, using Loom videos I record to show you exactly how each job is done. You'll also have access to a full AI assistant (Claude) that knows everything about my business — all the strategy documents, the 90-day plan, the training video list, all of it. You can ask it questions and get answers based on my actual business documents.



Your daily tasks will include:



Content & Video



• Edit raw TikTok and diary videos — add captions, cut dead air, add intro/outro

• Cross-post edited videos to
, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

• Build Canva slides for training videos using provided templates

• Combine AI-generated voiceover audio with slide decks to produce finished training videos

• Upload completed training videos to GoHighLevel members area

• Schedule all social posts one week ahead using Buffer



Marketing & Tracking



• Create and manage tracking links in Bitly — name them correctly and update the tracker

• Update the traffic sources spreadsheet weekly with click and lead data

• Monitor
 ad metrics daily — flag any ad with high cost per click

• Post diary content to relevant
 groups in the network marketing niche

• Monitor and respond to basic social media comments (flag anything that needs me personally)



Admin & Platform



• Maintain the 90-day activity plan tracker — mark completed tasks

• Research tasks as assigned — solo ad vendors, podcast hosts, JV partners

• Help manage tech support hotline calendar and booking confirmations

• Any other tasks that come up as the business grows



WHAT YOU NEED TO HAVE



Essential — don't apply without these:



• Canva — basic

• CapCut or similar video editing tool — basic editing, captions, cuts

• Strong written English — you'll be posting on my behalf

• Reliable internet and computer — non-negotiable

• Ability to work independently — I won't be checking in every hour

• Attention to detail — if you miss instructions, this isn't the role for you

• Self-starter mindset — you'll have documents and AI to help you; use them



Highly desirable — you'll move to the top of the list with these:



• GoHighLevel experience — even basic familiarity is a big plus

• Buffer, Later, or any scheduling tool experience

• Experience working with AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, or similar

• Social media marketing background

• Experience working for an Australian or Western business owner



WHAT YOU DON'T NEED



I don't expect you to know everything on day one. I'd rather hire someone with great fundamentals and a genuine work ethic than someone with a perfect CV who cuts corners.



• You don't need GoHighLevel expertise — I'll show you exactly what to do in it

• You don't need video production experience beyond basic editing

• You don't need to be a tech wizard — but you do need to be willing to learn new tools



WORKING WITH ME



A few things you should know before you apply:



• I communicate directly and honestly. I'll tell you when something is wrong and I'll tell you when something is great. I don't do passive-aggressive.

• I use AI heavily in my own work. You'll be expected to do the same. If you're afraid of AI tools, this is the wrong job.

• I document everything with Loom videos. Every new task gets a screen recording walkthrough. You watch it, you do it, you ask me if you're stuck.

• I give autonomy. Once you've proven you understand a task, I trust you to run it. I don't micromanage.

• I'm building something real. This isn't a boring data entry role. You'll see exactly how an AI-powered online business works from the inside.



What I expect in return:



• Show up on time. Do what you say you'll do.

• Tell me when something is unclear before it becomes a mistake.

• Bring ideas. If you see a smarter way to do something, tell me.

• Take pride in the work. Your output represents my brand.



POSITION DETAILS



Position     Type Part-time to start (3-4 hrs/day), then full-time (7-8 hrs/day)

Location    100% remote — work from anywhere

Hours     Flexible — but you must be available for overlap with AEST (Brisbane time)

Start Date As soon as the right person is found

Trial Period 2 weeks paid trial before full-time offer

Salary     Competitive — based on experience. State your expected rate in AUD per month when you apply.

Growth This role grows as the business grows. More responsibility = more pay.



HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY



Do not send a generic cover letter. I will not read it.



Instead, send me a short message 
 or OnlineJobs.ph message) that answers these four questions:



1. What is one tool on the requirements list that you use regularly, and give me one specific example of a task you completed with it?

2. Tell me honestly: which task in this job description would take you the longest to learn, and why?

3. What's your expected monthly rate in AUD, and how many hours per day are you available to start?

4. At the end of your message, write the phrase: 'I read the whole ad.' This is how I know you followed instructions.



Why This Application Process?

Because the most important skill in this role is following instructions carefully.

If you can't follow a simple 4-step application process, I can't trust you to manage my brand, my content, and my tracking systems.

This is not designed to be difficult. It's designed to be a filter.

The right person will find it easy.



Apply via OnlineJobs.ph or
:

description:

Gig Based Compensation

title: eCommerce Business Executive

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE PRIOR EXPERIENCE PROVIDING SUPPORT FOR LEARNING PLATFORMS OR SCHEDULING SOFTWARE.





We are looking for a Customer Support Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for customers needing assistance with our platform. 



In this role, you will provide prompt and professional support while coordinating internally to ensure customer concerns are addressed effectively. You will work closely with internal teams to ensure a seamless support experience for customers, particularly during onboarding and implementation phases. The role also involves identifying recurring issues, sharing insights with internal stakeholders, and contributing to improvements in processes, documentation, and overall service delivery.



As the company continues to grow, you will play an important role in strengthening support operations and helping refine the overall customer support experience.



Responsibilities

• Manage daily customer inquiries and support requests, providing accurate, timely, and professional responses to questions, issues, and general platform usage concerns.

• Serve as a support partner for internal teams during onboarding or implementation processes by assisting with issue resolution and escalating more complex cases when necessary.

• Track, organize, and categorize incoming requests to identify recurring issues, common challenges, and opportunities to improve support processes and response efficiency.

• Create, update, and maintain customer-facing resources and internal documentation to ensure information remains clear, accurate, and easily accessible.



Requirements

• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal (MUST)

• Experience providing customer support or assisting customers in a professional environment (MUST)

• Ability to work in a fast-paced and evolving work environment.

• Experience using a ticketing or case management system to track and manage customer requests.



Who You Are

• An analytical thinker who looks beyond individual issues to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.

• A clear and professional communicator who values clarity, empathy, and accuracy in every interaction.

• A proactive problem-solver who takes initiative to find answers and ensure customer concerns are resolved effectively.

• Highly organized and capable of managing multiple tasks while maintaining attention to detail.

• A collaborative team player who works well with colleagues across different functions.

• Motivated by delivering excellent service and creating a positive experience for customers.



Work Schedule

• Full-time role in a work-from-home setup

• 8 hours per shift, 5 days per week





HOW TO APPLY? FOLLOW THE STEPS BELOW:

        1. PLEASE USE “SPECIALIST” AS THE SUBJECT LINE WHEN SUBMITTING YOUR APPLICATION.

title: Finance Manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced Finance Manager, International to lead financial planning and analysis for international markets. This role serves as a key business partner to cross-functional leaders, driving budgeting, forecasting, reporting, and strategic financial insights across global regions.



The ideal candidate combines strong analytical expertise with strategic thinking and the ability to translate financial data into actionable recommendations that support growth and operational efficiency.



Responsibilities:



Lead annual budgeting and monthly forecasting processes for international markets, ensuring alignment with company objectives

Conduct in-depth financial analysis to assess business performance, trends, and growth opportunities

Perform budget-to-actual variance analysis and clearly communicate key drivers to leadership

Develop and maintain financial models to support scenario planning and long-term strategy

Provide decision support to leadership through financial insights and performance analysis

Partner with regional and country leaders to develop and track KPIs

Prepare and present management reports highlighting key financial metrics and trends

Collaborate cross-functionally, including close partnership with Accounting during monthly close cycles

Conduct ad hoc analysis to support strategic initiatives and business decisions

Identify and implement process improvements within FP&A workflows to increase efficiency and accuracy



Requirements:



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field; MBA or advanced degree preferred

4–6 years of FP&A experience

Strong expertise in budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and financial modeling

Experience building three-statement financial models and cash flow forecasts is strongly preferred

Proficiency in Excel and financial analysis tools

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and data interpretation skills

Excellent communication and presentation skills

Experience partnering with cross-functional and international stakeholders

Strategic mindset with the ability to convert financial data into business insights

title: Customer Support Representative for Growing Women's Fashion Brand
description:
Dear candidate,



We run a fast-growing international women's fashion eCommerce brand. We currently operate one highly successful store and are actively planning to expand into multiple countries in the near future.



We are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those who consistently make a positive contribution to our company. We are seeking outstanding candidates who will represent the brand with empathy, excellent customer service, and absolute dedication.



Essentially, this is a Customer Support role where you will follow clear processes to keep our customers happy. The workflow will become very simple and highly efficient once you understand every step.



MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF THESE PLATFORMS:

Gorgias (support help desk)

Shopify (eCommerce platform)


 (internal team communication)

DeepL / AI Tools (for professional translation)



Responsibilities:

Handling customer inquiries and complaints.

Reporting on refunds and exchanges.

Responding to customer
s regarding sizing, tracking numbers, and general FAQs.

Contributing to our documentation and improving our support processes.

Responding to all customer inquiries in a timely, accurate, and empathetic manner.

We maintain a strict ETA of 24 hours, so you must clear the inbox within this timeframe.

Demonstrating a high level of professionalism at all times.



We will provide you with:

Video training.

Clear Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to follow.

Access to the Lead of Customer Support to answer all your questions.



Applicant needs to:

Speak and write fluent English.

Have a minimum of 2 years of experience in Customer Support.

Be available for weekly team checks.

Be highly organized, motivated, and willing to learn and grow.

Be available to join immediately.



Note: You must be available for a minimum of 20 hours per week at the beginning for a trial period of 2 weeks. After that, if everything goes perfectly, you will be offered a full-time position.



Ideally, you will have solid experience in eCommerce customer support, but ultimately we want to work with someone who genuinely loves helping people. I do not want any inconsistency in the
s exchanged with our customers (e.g., sending the same
 twice, imprecise answers, or off-topic automated replies).



MANDATORY TEST: As a final test of your attention to detail and your ability to use translation tools effectively, please include the following at the very bottom of your proposal. Imagine a customer writes to us in Spanish saying: "Hola, en vuestra página web pone que lleváis trabajando en Alicante más de 20 años, pero yo vivo allí y no he visto nunca una tienda vuestra.Dónde está exactamente? ¿Es una estafa? Please write your exact proposed response to this customer in fluent, professional Spanish, and then provide the English translation below it. Proposals without this exact test completed will be automatically rejected.



Please respond by telling me about your previous similar experience and why you think you are a perfect fit for this job.

I look forward to your proposal. Thank you!

title: Video Editor (E-commerce)
description:
We're a multi-7-figure DTC brand scaling to $10M+ this year, and we're looking for an A++ video editor to join our creative team. Not good. Not solid. Elite.



We want someone who can do it all — direct response Meta ads that convert, viral TikToks and Reels that blow up, YouTube-style content with animations and motion graphics, AI-generated visuals, 3D renders — the full spectrum. If you're the kind of editor who makes people stop scrolling and say "how the hell did they make that?" — keep reading.



The day-to-day:

• Edit direct response ads for Meta, TikTok, and paid channels — UGC-style ads, testimonial mashups, product demos, VSLs, and performance creative.

• Create viral organic content for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts that feels native and gets shared.

• Push creative boundaries — AI-generated content, 3D renders, custom animations, motion graphics, cinematic transitions, and anything that makes us stand out in the feed.

• Edit longer-form YouTube-style content with professional animations and graphics.

• Work closely with our creative strategist and copywriter — they bring the angles and scripts, you bring them to life.

• Iterate fast — we test a lot of creative. High output without sacrificing quality.



Already experienced in direct response? Perfect — you're exactly what we need. Insanely talented but no direct response experience? That works too. If you're behind viral content racking up millions of views and can do jaw-dropping work with AI, 3D, and animation — we'll teach you direct response. You bring the talent, we'll give you the frameworks.



Show Us What You've Got

This role is all about the work. Your application should include:

• A portfolio or reel — show us your best edits. We want to see range: paid ads, viral content, animations, AI-generated work, 3D, motion graphics — whatever showcases your ceiling.

• Links to any viral content you've created — TikToks, Reels, Shorts. If it blew up, we want to see it.

• Examples of direct response or performance ads you've edited (if applicable).

• Tools and software you use — editing, animation, AI, 3D, all of it.

• Your availability and timezone.



We're looking for a full-time editor who becomes a core part of our creative team. If you're obsessed with editing, constantly leveling up, and want creative freedom at a brand that's scaling aggressively — we want to hear from you.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter ($2,000 – $4,000 Per Month)
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday, normal Philippine working hours



Young Publisher | 
/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time, Monday to Friday, Philippine standard working hours

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
Salon Marketing Solutions is an Australian-based marketing education company supporting beauty salons, skin clinics, and aesthetic businesses across Australia and New Zealand. We provide done-for-you campaigns, strategic mentoring, and practical tools to help clinic owners grow consistently and confidently.



Please ONLY apply if you have experience in the ff:
 Marketing, Meta Ads, Canva Pro, Meta Business Suite 



Recruited and Trained by Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™ Service

Installed™ builds in-house marketing capability for beauty and skin clinics.

This role is a 4–6 week training and placement pathway, preparing you to run the full social media marketing function inside a clinic — not as an agency, but as an embedded tea
mber.



Purpose: 



To lead and execute a clinic’s social media marketing strategy, design, content, engagement, and paid ads — with the goal of growing visibility, followers, and lead lists. You will be placed with a growing clinic business (to be advised at the second interview) and work directly with the clinic owner following installation.

 marketing will be required on an ad-hoc basis to complement social strategy.

This is an incredible opportunity to learn directly from Vanessa McDonald — one of Australia’s most respected marketing strategists in the professional beauty and skincare industry, with 24 years of experience guiding clinics to build sustainable, high-performing marketing systems.



You’ll be trained in:



The beauty, skin, and aesthetics industry — treatments, terminology, and client psychology.

The specific clinic’s business, brand, and product range.

 marketing systems used within the industry, including Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these only if the clinic you are placed with uses these particular platforms).



Core Responsibilities: 



- Develop and implement Instagram and
 strategies that drive engagement, growth, and qualified new client leads.

- Manage Meta Ads end-to-end: strategy, creative, setup, optimisation, and reporting.

- Confidently operate within the Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager, keeping up to date with current Meta tools and best practices.

- Design high-quality, on-brand content in Canva Pro, following the clinic’s brand style guide.

- Create and edit reels and short-form videos using apps such as CapCut or similar.

- Write fluent, polished UK English captions and campaign copy that reflect the clinic’s tone of voice.

- Manage DMs and engagement daily — responding to enquiries, nurturing prospective clients, and connecting with local influencers and aligned businesses for collaboration opportunities.

- Build and send
 campaigns using Mailchimp or the clinic’s in-house marketing system (Mailchimp expertise is essential).

- Utilise AI tools to enhance efficiency while preserving human judgment and creative quality.

- Prepare concise monthly reports covering organic performance, ads, and
 activity.

- Once Installed, you’ll work directly with the clinic owner using a clear communication and project management system that sets expectations, deadlines, and approvals.



Required Experience & Skills



- Minimum 3 years’ proven experience in social media strategy and Meta Ads management.

- Demonstrated results in organic audience growth and engagement.

- Strong proficiency with Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, data analysis, and reporting.

- Advanced Canva Pro design capability with excellent attention to detail. We’re seeking candidates who can create clean, professional artwork and design aligned to brand standards.

- Confident in photo editing and basic retouching to ensure all visual content is polished, consistent, and on-brand.

- Skilled in reel creation and short-form video editing (CapCut preferred).

- Expert in Mailchimp, including automation, segmentation, and reporting.

- Adaptable to other industry platforms such as Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these systems only).

- Familiar with ManyChat or similar tools for automated lead capture.

- Excellent written and spoken UK English for an Australian audience (10/10 fluency).

- Reliable, responsive, and professional in remote settings.

- Must successfully complete a test task before onboarding.



Work Structure & Conditions

Part-time: 20 hours per week (remote, flexible)

Training rate: $175 AUD/week (6-8 weeks)

Probation (3 months): $200 AUD/week

After 12 months: $240 AUD/week

12months +: 280AUD per week 

Performance bonuses apply for meeting or exceeding campaign KPIs and results benchmarks.

If you prefer full-time work, you may be placed with two clinics instead of one.

All recruitment, training, and placement are managed through Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™.



To maintain quality and focus:

You cannot work with other beauty or skin clinics in Australia or New Zealand.

You may retain a small number of freelance clients outside this industry, provided your total weekly workload remains under 50 hours.

You’ll have full ownership of strategy ? design ? captions ? scheduling ? reporting, supported by structured systems, brand training, and direct client collaboration.



Hiring Process



Application review: We assess your cover letter, résumé, and portfolio for relevance and quality.

Initial interview: A video interview with our recruitment specialist to discuss experience, fit, and expectations.

Test task: You’ll complete a short assignment to demonstrate your ability in design, content creation, and social strategy.

Final interview: Successful applicants are invited to a second interview with Vanessa McDonald.

Presentation matters — please ensure a professional appearance, a stable internet and audio connection, and a tidy background during interviews.



Fill out this form to apply:

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.



This opportunity is well suited for someone comfortable working with production systems and capable of making sound technical decisions when improving backend architecture.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and enhance backend services supporting live applications

- Develop and improve backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and managing applications on Google Cloud Platform

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

- Experience managing production environments with a focus on performance, security, and reliability (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based version control systems such as GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket

- Experience implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical thinking and ability to independently recommend technical improvements

- Clear English communication skills, especially when explaining technical approaches



Preferred Experience:

- Experience working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as Firebase Analytics or GCP Logging/Monitoring

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction or mentoring developers during project transitions



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (Approximately 20 hours per week)

- Full-Time (Available)

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

title: Customer Success Expert
description:
We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Customer Success Expert, who has experience with a company doing 5million USD/EUR revenue per year, to help us provide excellent customer service to our customers.



You will assist customers with inquiries, resolve issues efficiently, and ensure a smooth and positive customer experience. You will also provide weekly reports summarizing key customer feedback and insights to the Product Team and Customer Success Manager.



This is a remote role, ideal for someone who communicates clearly, works independently, and takes ownership of customer interactions.



About Us:

At Best Life, we believe that good sleep and pain-free living shouldn’t be a luxury. We’re a fast-growing company that designs ergonomic sleep and comfort products — and we’re always on the lookout for smart, motivated people to help us grow even further. We’re not a big corporate machine. We’re a small team with big goals, and we genuinely care about what we do (and about each other). If you’re looking for a place where your ideas matter, your growth is encouraged, and your work makes a real impact — welcome to Best Life.



Job Responsibilities and Tasks:



- Respond to customer
s and messages in a professional and friendly manner

- Answer product questions and help customers choose the right product

- Assist customers with orders, shipping inquiries, and returns

- Handle complaints calmly and find solutions for customers

- Track and follow up on unresolved customer issues

- Escalate complex issues to the team when necessary

- Help improve FAQ responses and support processes over time

- Maintain clear documentation of customer interactions



Skills and Qualifications:



- Has excellent written English communication skills

- Has previous customer support experience

- Is patient, friendly, and solution-oriented when handling customers

- Is organized and detail-oriented

- Can work independently without constant supervision

- Has stable internet and a reliable computer

- Has reporting experience



Bonus (not required):



- Experience with Shopify or e-commerce platforms

- Experience with Gorgias

- Experience handling returns, refunds, and order tracking



Salary:

$4–$6 per hour. Compensation will be adjusted based on your experience, skills, and previous customer support work.



How to Apply:

To apply, please send the following:

-Your resume or portfolio

-A 1–2 minute video introduction about yourself. In the video, please briefly talk about:

     -Your customer support experience

     -The tools or platforms you’ve worked with (Shopify, Gorgias, etc.)

     -The company you have worked for.



To make sure you read this post carefully, please start your application with the word:  “SLEEP BETTER”

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Stack Developer – Long-Term Partnership Opportunity
description:
About MSTR



MSTR (
) is a specialized AI software company based in the Netherlands. We build custom AI-driven solutions that transform how businesses work – making them more productive, data-driven, and intelligent.



We're not just building software; we're pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI technology. From proof-of-concept to production-ready applications, we deliver end-to-end solutions that make a real impact.





This is a Long-Term Career Opportunity



We're looking for developers who want to build a long-term career with us, not just find their next gig. We invest in our tea
mbers' growth, provide ongoing learning opportunities, and increase responsibility as you develop.



If you're seeking long-term stability, continuous learning, and the chance to work on cutting-edge AI projects, keep reading.



Location & Type

- Remote (work from anywhere in the Philippines)

- Full-time (40 hours/week)

- Long-term contractor position



What You'll Do



As a Full-Stack Developer at MSTR, you'll:

- Transform AI concepts into reality: Take proofs-of-concept and build production-ready applications

- Build modern web applications: Create responsive front-end (React) and robust REST APIs (Python/FastAPI)

- Integrate AI services: Connect AI models and services into seamless user experiences

- Collaborate with experts: Work alongside back-end developers, data scientists, and AI specialists

- Solve real problems: Proactively identify issues and propose elegant solutions

- Grow continuously: Learn new technologies, expand your skills, take on bigger challenges



What We're Looking For



Must-Have Skills:

- 1-3 years full-stack development experience

- Modern JavaScript/TypeScript** (React or similar frameworks)

- RESTful API development** (Python back-end strongly preferred)

- Strong problem-solving abilities** and attention to detail

- Excellent English communication** (written and verbal)

- Growth mindset: Eager to learn, improve, and tackle new challenges

- Long-term focus: Looking for a career, not just a job



Nice-to-Have Skills:

- Experience with: FastAPI, Pydantic, Instructor

- Cloud platforms: Azure, GCP, or AWS

- DevOps tools: Docker, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines

- Database experience: PostgreSQL

- AI/ML curiosity or experience

- Git version control



Most Important:

We value potential and enthusiasm just as much as current technical skills. A driven junior developer with a strong foundation and hunger to learn is more valuable to us than an experienced developer without long-term commitment.



What We Offer:

- Competitive compensation and benefits

- Flexible remote work – work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Long-term partnership – we're investing in your long-term future with us

- Continuous learning – work with cutting-edge AI technology, modern tech stack

- Freedom to innovate – propose solutions, choose appropriate technologies

- Collaborative team – work with passionate, talented people

- Career growth – increasing responsibility and challenges as you develop

- Meaningful work – build applications that genuinely help businesses transform



Our Tech Stack



You'll work with modern, industry-leading technologies:

- Front-end: React, TypeScript

- Back-end: Python, FastAPI, Pydantic

- Database: PostgreSQL

- AI/ML: Various AI services and models

- Cloud: Azure (primary), with exposure to other platforms

- DevOps: Docker, CI/CD, Pulumi



How to Apply



?? IMPORTANT: We assess candidates primarily through video responses. Please DO NOT apply without submitting a video.



Step 1: Create a Short Video (3-7 minutes)



Record yourself answering these 5 questions:



1. Tell us about yourself: Briefly introduce yourself and your journey as a developer.



2. Your technical skills: What are your key technical skills? Describe a challenging project you've worked on and how you solved it.



3. AI and technology: What interests you about working with AI technologies? Why does this excite you?



4. Learning approach: How do you approach learning new technologies? Give us a recent example.



5. Your next role: What would you like to achieve in your next role? Where do you see yourself in 5-10 years?



Video Guidelines:

- Length: 3-7 minutes total

- Production: No need for professional quality – we want to see the real you

- Authenticity: Share your own thoughts and personality—please do NOT read a ChatGPT-generated script because we notice immediately

- Language: English (this assesses your communication skills)

- Format: Any video format is fine (MP4, MOV, etc.)

- Hosting: Upload to Google Drive, Dropbox, YouTube (unlisted), or similar



Step 2: Submit Your Application

Send the following to 

1. Your video (link or attachment)

2. Your CV/Resume

3. Optional: Portfolio, GitHub profile, LinkedIn profile, or work samples





 Subject Line: "Full-Stack Developer Application - [Your Name]"



What Happens Next:

1. We'll review your video and CV within 2-3 days

2. If you're a strong match, we'll schedule an initial interview

3. Successful candidates move to technical evaluation

4. Final candidates meet with our founder

5. We aim to complete the entire process in 1-2 weeks



Who Should Apply

? Apply if you:

- Want a long-term career in a high-performance organization

- Are excited about AI and modern technology

- Value continuous learning and growth

- Communicate well in English

- Are driven, reliable, and proactive

- Want to build meaningful applications



? Don't apply if you:

- Only want short-term gigs or are juggling multiple clients

- Aren't willing to create a video response

- Don't have foundational full-stack skills

- Aren't interested in long-term commitment



About Our Team



We're building a diverse, talented team of developers who are passionate about AI and technology. We value:

- Quality over quantity – we hire carefully and invest in our people

- Long-term thinking – every hire is for the next 10 years

- Continuous learning – technology evolves, and so do we

- Collaboration – we win together

- Impact – build things that matter



Ready to Apply?



If you're excited about this opportunity and ready to build a long-term career with MSTR, we'd love to hear from you!



Send your video and CV to: 



We look forward to learning more about you!



MSTR – Building the Future with AI

title: Amazon Private Label and PPC Specialist
description:
About the role

We are an Australian owned business with a UK based private label brand on Amazon.

You will be managing a UK marketplace private label brand for an Australian client.

We are looking for an experienced Amazon specialist in the Philippines to manage our advertising campaigns, support A plus content, and stay on top of performance every week. You will work closely with our creative team to brief and improve images and video so the brand stays competitive and profitable.



Key responsibilities

1. Campaign and ad management

Set up, manage, and optimise Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns.

Monitor Amazon Ads and Ad Console several times per week within your agreed hours.

Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to reach ACOS and TACOS targets.

Manage keyword research, search term reports, and negative keywords.

Run regular tests on creatives, headlines, and placements.

2. Private label brand management

Work only on our private label listings, not arbitrage or wholesale.

Review competitor listings, pricing, and offers on the UK marketplace.

Suggest changes to offers, pricing, and promotions based on data.

Coordinate with the team on review strategy and listing quality.

3. A plus content and listings

Review current listings and A plus content for clarity, keyword coverage, and conversion.

Brief the creative team on images, infographics, comparison charts, and brand story modules.

Check uploads on Amazon once the creative team delivers the assets.

Suggest ongoing improvements based on performance data.

4. Creative and video ads

Plan what image and video assets are needed for ads and product detail pages.

Provide clear briefs to designers and video editors with examples and references.

Review final assets before upload and confirm they meet Amazon guidelines.

Monitor performance of video ads and propose changes when needed.

5. Reporting and optimisation

Prepare a short weekly performance summary with key numbers, including ACOS, TACOS, ad spend, sales, best and worst performers, and search terms.

Flag any issues early, including sudden drops in performance or policy warnings.

Keep simple dashboards or spreadsheets up to date.



Skills and experience

Strong experience managing Amazon Ads for private label brands, with at least one year of hands on experience in Amazon PPC and Ad Console.

Confident in managing Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display.

Confident in keyword research and search term analysis.

Experience with bid and budget optimisation and negative keyword strategy.

Good understanding of listing optimisation, including titles, bullet points, images, and A plus content.

Experience working with a creative team and giving clear, structured briefs.

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for basic reports and analysis.

Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Data Dive, or similar.

Strong English reading and writing skills, with a focus on UK marketplace wording.

Personal qualities

Proactive and organised, always aware of campaign performance.

Detail focused, especially with numbers, bids, and budgets.

Comfortable working independently with light supervision.

Clear and direct communicator, able to explain needs and findings to the creative and leadership team.

Strong sense of ownership for results and ad spend.



Hours and working pattern

Approximately 3 to 5 hours per week to start.

Flexible schedule, as long as agreed weekly tasks and reporting are completed on time.

Potential for more hours as the brand grows and results improve.

Benefits

Work from home, long term role for the right person.

Stable client based in Australia with growth plans in the UK marketplace.

Opportunity to grow hours and responsibilities over time.

title: Influencer Marketing Role | Direct Client |Morning Shift
description:
Who Are We?

Nordic Quality is an extremely awesome, up-and-coming, online-based company selling physical products under several of our brands. The main one of which is in the gym and fitness category.



Who are we looking for?

We are looking for an Influencer Marketing Manager with some familiarity in Social Media Management to play a crucial role at Nordic Quality, a company specializing in gym equipment and weight-lifting products. This role involves managing and expanding partnerships with fitness influencers, as well as overseeing the brand’s social media presence across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and
. The ideal candidate is passionate about health and fitness, stays up to date with social media trends, and has experience building engaging content and communities in the gym and weightlifting space.



WHAT WOULD THE TASK BE?



-Build all processes for acquiring new digital influencers, as well as maintaining existing ones.

-Identifying the most relevant influencers in the industry on major and minor social media channels such as YouTube,
, Instagram, Slickdeals, etc., by doing research and/ or using tools.

Form relationships with influencers before asking them to advocate for the products or the company in general.

- Persuade digital influencers to promote our products with little to no upfront cost;

- Ensure that all possible measures have been taken to retain existing influencers.

- Establish a Sponsored Athlete Program, affiliate programs, and partnerships with influencers, and manage everything related to these.

- Set up and take charge of activities surrounding the Influencer page on the company website;

- Boost the brand's online presence on relevant forums/message boards by responding to comments and subtly promoting our products.

- Lead the department dedicated to influencer marketing, once set up, and collaborate with other tea
mbers of other departments whenever necessary.

- Come up with a marketing plan/strategy on a weekly/monthly basis  (work alongside the marketing manager to do this, especially for our product promotions); 

- Tally UGCs for content posting on social media, including Instagram,
, YouTube, and TikTok.

- Social Media Management: Plan, coordinate, and schedule social media content on
, Instagram, and TikTok at least two weeks (14 days) in advance while also managing real-time updates and promotional posts in collaboration with the Marketing team/Marketing Assistant to keep calendars accurate, timely, and aligned with campaign priorities.

- Manage some Amazon Ads or work on other Amazon-related tasks in Amazon US, Amazon UK, and Amazon Japan (using ChatGPT whenever needed);

- Create an attribute link for promotions and influencers and analyze them as part of the KPI every month.

- Create and manage campaigns and influencers on Amazon Creator Connections on a regular basis.

- Create and maintain updated SOPs for the Influencer Team.

- Regularly review existing SOPs and make adjustments as needed.

- Other related tasks or tasks in the marketing department.

- Slack (communication tool) visibility during the contractor’s working hours. 



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in lead generation, influencer outreach, and social media management. Preferably in the e-commerce or fitness industry (but not necessarily)

- Familiarity with lead generation tools and CRM systems (is a plus!)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

-Has experience with Canva

- Has an interest in creating compelling social media posts

- Ability to multitask, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

- Knowledge of basic marketing principles and techniques.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



You must also have the following;

- With a perfectly working device (additional backup is a plus)

- With a reliable internet connection (additional backup is required)

- Headphones/earphones (for meetings)



HOW TO APPLY?

Congratulations on making it this far in the job application process! Interested? We'd be delighted to hear from you.

Please carefully follow all of the instructions below to send an application:



1. Use the following as the subject of your message:

Influencer Marketing - (Insert Your Full Name Here)

Example: Influencer Marketing - Maria Santos



2. Cover Letter - The body of your message will serve as your cover letter, so discuss your experience and persuade me to add you to the team while highlighting your writing abilities.



3 The link to your CV/ resume (strictly with your picture)



4. IMPORTANT NOTE: Type at least one of Nordic Quality's MAIN BRAND on the very first line of your cover letter. Here's a hint: Google is your best friend.





Thank you & Best of luck!

title: Real Estate Research & Admin Support
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant | Real Estate Lead Research & Data Management



Job Overview:

I am a real estate investor based in Miami looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join me for a 1-month trial project. You will act as my "right hand" for data organization and lead research. If you are efficient, reliable, and have a "can-do" attitude, this role has the potential to become a long-term position as my business grows.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Research: Identify and extract property data from public county websites (e.g., Property Appraiser, Clerk of Court records) based on specific criteria I provide.



Data Organization: Maintain and clean lead lists in Google Sheets. You must be comfortable ensuring data is accurate, formatted correctly, and easy to read.



Skip Tracing: Use online tools to find contact information (phone numbers/emails) for property owners.



CRM/Database Management: Input qualified leads into our tracking system (Google Sheets) and update lead statuses daily.



Administrative Support: Help with basic tasks as needed. 



Requirements:



Tech-Savvy: You must be proficient in Google Sheets (formulas, filtering, formatting).



Attention to Detail: You catch errors that others miss. Accuracy is more important than speed.



Proactive Problem Solver: If a website is down or a data point is missing, I want you to tell me what alternative path you found, not just stop working.



Communication: Excellent written English. You will provide a short End-of-Day (EOD) report summarizing what you accomplished.



Reliability: You are available to work 20 hours per week and hit your deadlines consistently.



Project Details:



Duration: 1 month (trial period).



Compensation: $5 per hour



Work Style: Remote / Independent Contractor.



How to Apply:

Please send me a message with the following:



A brief summary of your experience with real estate research or data entry.



Your favorite movie (to ensure you read this description!).



Confirmation that you are available to start immediately for this 1-month trial.

title: GoHighLevel Expert — Custom Systems & Webhook Integrations
description:
About Us

We run a growing digital marketing agency that helps contractors and tradespeople in the Netherlands get more leads and manage their business online. Our tech stack is built around GoHighLevel for CRM, automation, and client communication — and we use tools like Lovable to spin up client websites fast.



We're a small, no-nonsense team. We build practical systems that work, and we move quickly. If you like figuring out smart solutions without overcomplicating things, you'll fit in well here.



What You'll Be Working On

We need someone who can take GoHighLevel further than the out-of-the-box setup. Specifically:

- Building and maintaining custom automation workflows (lead follow-up, missed call triggers, pipeline management)

Setting up and troubleshooting custom webhooks to connect GHL with external tools — particularly Lovable and other web apps

- Creating reliable two-way data flows between GHL and third-party platforms

- Configuring pipelines, opportunity management, and CRM structure for multiple client accounts

- Occasional work on sub-accounts, snapshots, and white-label setup





What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



- Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (not just theoretical, show us what you've built)

- Strong understanding of webhooks, API calls, and how to connect GHL to external systems

- Comfortable with JSON, HTTP requests, and debugging webhook payloads

- Experience with workflow automation inside GHL (triggers, actions, conditionals)

- Reliable communicator, you keep us updated and flag issues early



Nice-to-haves:



- Experience with Lovable or similar low-code/AI website builders

- Familiarity with Zapier, Make, or n8n as middleware

- Background in agency setups (sub-accounts, snapshots, SaaS mode)

- Experience with WhatsApp automation via GHL





How to Apply

Send us a short message with:



1. A brief description of a GHL system you built — what the problem was, what you built, and how it worked

2. One example of a custom webhook integration you set up (what tools were connected, what it did)

3. Your rate and availability

4. A short loom introduction about yourself and why we should hire you!

title: We're Hiring: Facebook Ads Media Buyer
description:
Meta Ads Media Buyer — Marketing Agency | Remote | $1,500–$2,000/month



What We Do



We run Meta ads for outdoor living contractors (pergolas, pools, turf, pavers, outdoor kitchens) across the US. Our model is simple: we generate leads, our setters book appointments, contractors close deals. We charge per appointment. If the ads don't perform, clients leave. If they perform, clients stay and grow. The media buyer is the most important role in our company.



What You'll Own



You will manage 15–25 Meta ad accounts independently. That means:



Campaign strategy, setup, and optimization across all accounts. You d
 what to test, when to scale, when to kill. Nobody is going to tell you what buttons to press.



Creative direction: You write briefs for our video editor, review output, and d
 what runs. You don't need to edit video, but you need to know what converts.



Cost per lead and cost per appointment are your numbers. You own them. If CPL is high, you fix it. You don't wait for someone to tell you there's a problem.



Landing page and lead form optimization. You'll work inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to build and test funnels. If you haven't used GHL, that's fine. But you need to understand funnel logic.



Who This Is For



You've managed Meta campaigns for local service businesses. not ecom, not info products, not dropshipping. Local. You understand targeting, lead forms vs landing pages, and why cost per lead alone is a bad metric without conversion data behind it.



You can look at an ad account and within 10 minutes tell me what's wrong and what you'd test first. Not because you read it in a course. 



You don't need to be managed. You need to be pointed in a direction and left alone to produce results. If you need daily check ins and hand holding, this is not the role.



Who This Is NOT For

If you completed a Meta ads course and now call yourself a media buyer, don't apply!



If your experience is boosting posts for restaurants, don't apply!



If you need someone to review every decision before you make it, don't apply!



Compensation

$1,500–$2,000/month depending on experience. This is a full-time remote position. We're a small team that communicates on Slack. We don't do daily standups or unnecessary meetings. 



We do results.



How To Apply



Send your application with:



1. A 2-3 minute Loom video walking us through the last local service business account you managed on Meta. Show us the account if you can, or just talk through it: what was the niche, what was the monthly spend, what results did you get, and what would you have done differently. No scripts. No editing. Just talk. We want to see how you think and communicate.



2. Answer this question: An outdoor remodeling client is spending $100/day on Meta. Their CPL is $45 but their cost per booked appointment is $380. CTR is strong at 2.1%. What's your diagnosis and what do you test first?



3. If you make it past the first round, you'll receive a real screenshot from one of our accounts and 48 hours to submit a written audit, what's wrong, what you'd change, and why. This is how we hire. 





We care if you can think independently and deliver results. If that's you, apply. If you're not sure, it's probably not.
