title: Remote Accounts / Admin Executive
description:
*Accounts/Admin Role Job Description*



*** MUST HAVE PRIOR WORKING EXPERIENCE IN A SINGAPORE COMPANY***



*Key Responsibilities*



#### *Accounting Duties*

- Manage accounts payable (AP) and accounts receivable (AR), including processing invoices, payments, and tracking outstanding balances.

- Reconcile financial statements, including bank statements, to ensure accuracy and resolve discrepancies.

- Prepare and issue invoices to customers for products or services rendered.

- Monitor and follow up on overdue payments to ensure timely collections.

- Maintain updated financial records in accounting software and spreadsheets.

- Assist in preparing monthly financial reports, budgets, and cash flow statements.



#### *Administrative Duties*

- Oversee general office administration, including procurement of office supplies and maintaining office equipment.

- Coordinate with external vendors for services such as IT support or maintenance.

- Provide support to management by preparing reports, scheduling meetings, and handling correspondence.



#### *Order Taking & Service Coordination*

- Assist in processing customer orders accurately and efficiently.

- Coordinate service schedules to ensure timely delivery or execution of services.

- Act as a liaison between customers and the operations team to address service-related issues.

- Maintain clear communication with customers regarding order status or changes.



#### *Invoicing Support*

- Prepare, send, and store invoices for all transactions.

- Reconcile customer payments with bank statements to ensure accuracy.

- Track outstanding payments and follow up with clients when necessary.



#### *General Support*

- Provide backup support for other administrative staff during their absence by managing their tasks effectively.

- Respond to internal and external inquiries related to accounting, administrative matters, or customer orders.



### *Skills & Qualifications*

- Proven experience in an Accounts/Admin role or similar position.

- Strong knowledge of bookkeeping procedures and accounting software (Xero).

- Advanced proficiency in Excel (e.g., financial formulas, creating spreadsheets).

- Excellent organizational skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to identify numerical errors and resolve discrepancies efficiently.

- Strong communication skills for liaising with clients, vendors, and internal teams.



### *Preferred Qualifications*

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field is advantageous but not mandatory if relevant experience is demonstrated.

- Experience in service coordination or customer order management is a plus.

title: FOIA Requester for True Crime YouTube Channel (Long-Term)
description:
About the Role

We’re a growing YouTube channel that produces long-form true crime content using real documents, bodycam footage, and police interrogations.



We are looking for a FOIA Requester (Freedom of Information Act Requester) to help us obtain police records and video footage from agencies across the United States. You will be the one finding cases, filing requests, tracking responses, and organizing the material so our team can turn it into high-quality documentaries.



This is a long-term, stable role for someone who loves systems, organization, and—most importantly—true crime.



IMPORTANT – TRUE CRIME FANS ONLY

We are only hiring true crime fans.

In your application, you must answer these:

What is your favorite type of true crime content to watch? 

Share one specific case, series, or channel you enjoy and why.

Applications without these answers will not be considered.



Key Responsibilities

Research interesting i
 and cases (using news articles, court records, etc.) that could be good for video content.

Draft, submit, and follow up on FOIA / public records requests to police departments, sheriff’s offices, and other government agencies in the US.

Track all requests in spreadsheets .

Download, organize, and neatly label all returned files (videos, audio, documents) in Google Drive.

Filter out low-value or irrelevant cases and make initial judgment calls on whether something is worth pursuing further.

Communicate with agencies by
 and sometimes by phone (if needed) in clear, professional English.

Prepare short summaries of received materials so the team understands what we got.

Follow written SOPs step-by-step and suggest improvements when you see inefficiencies.



Required Skills & Qualities

You genuinely enjoy true crime content.

Strong written English – you’ll be
ing government agencies and reading official documents.

Highly organized – you live in Google Sheets / spreadsheets without getting overwhelmed.

Detail-oriented – you notice small inconsistencies, dates, names, and file labels.

Process-driven – you can follow SOPs exactly, but also give feedback to improve them.

Good judgment – you can d
 if a case is interesting, unique, and worth
.

Research skills – comfortable digging through news articles, public records, and websites to find information.

Tech-comfortable – using Google Drive, Google Sheets, Gmail, and basic video/file download tools.



Nice-to-Have (Not Required, but a Plus)

Any experience with FOIA, public records requests, legal research, or working with US-based clients.

Experience working with true crime channels, journalism, or content research.

Familiarity with tools like Trello, Notion, or other task/project systems.

Experience summarizing or organizing large amounts of information.



Content Warning

This job involves dealing with real crimes: violence, murder, and disturbing situations.

Please only apply if you are mentally and emotionally comfortable working with this type of material on a daily basis.



Hours & Compensation

Hours: Part-time (20 hours/week) with the opportunity to grow into full-time if it is a good fit

Schedule: Flexible, but you must be reachable during agreed working hours and keep your tasks up to date.



Salary: Competitive, based on experience (please include your desired monthly salary in USD in your application).



Long-term, stable work with the opportunity to grow as the channel expands.



To Apply

Complete the below IQ test and screenshot your result, include the result link in your application.


/

Send: relevant experience, availability/timezone.

Include your IQ number in the first line of your application, and include your favorite true crime YouTube channel in your application, or your application will not be considered.

title: Digital Product Strategist & Builder for Creator Brand (High-Agency Role)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable individual who can help turn a personal brand’s public content and expertise into sellable digital products.



The brand already has a large amount of publicly available content and knowledge. Your role will be to analyze that content, identify the most valuable ideas and frameworks, and turn them into digital products that can be sold online.



This is not a typical virtual assistant position. This role requires someone who can think strategically, take initiative, and help determine what products should exist in the first place.



Rather than being given a strict task list, you will be responsible for identifying opportunities, proposing ideas, and executing on them.



Examples of products you may help develop include:

• ebooks

• digital guides

• templates

• educational resources

• mini courses

• knowledge products



Your responsibilities may include:

• Reviewing public content and extracting useful ideas, frameworks, and systems

• Identifying digital product opportunities that align with the brand and audience

• Proposing product concepts and outlining them clearly

• Writing and developing digital products from start to finish

• Structuring knowledge into clear educational content

• Preparing products so they are ready to be sold online

• Iterating and improving products over time



This role requires a high level of ownership and initiative. You should be comfortable thinking independently, making recommendations, and driving projects forward.



You will collaborate with the brand owner when needed, but the expectation is that you can operate with minimal supervision once direction is clear.



IDEAL CANDIDATE

You may be a good fit if you:

• Have experience creating digital products such as ebooks, courses, or guides

• Are skilled at turning ideas or conversations into structured content

• Understand online education, digital products, or the creator economy

• Can research and identify product opportunities based on existing content

• Are highly organized and proactive

• Have strong written English skills

• Can take ownership of projects from idea to completion



Bonus experience:

• Instructional design or course creation

• Knowledge product development

• Notion, Canva, Gumroad, Kajabi, or similar platforms



IMPORTANT

This is a high-agency role. The goal is not just to complete tasks, but to help identify and build digital products that create real value.



If you enjoy taking ideas and turning them into structured, sellable products, this role will likely be a strong fit.



Open to hourly or project-based compensation depending on experience and portfolio. Please include your expected hourly rate.



Please include the following in your application:

Examples of digital products you have created (ebooks, courses, guides, etc.)

A short explanation of how you would analyze a personal brand’s content to determine what digital products should be created

Your expected hourly rate

Applicants who include examples of previous work will be prioritized.

This role has long-term potential for someone who can consistently help build valuable digital products over time.

title: Proofreader / Copy Editor (Work from home opportunity)
description:
Job description

We are looking for a highly proficient proofreader/editor responsible for maintaining the quality of the SEO content we write for our range of clients. We prefer someone from a journalism and communications background, and the candidate must have an extremely high level of attention to detail. Experience writing for Australian audiences for an agency is a plus. We work across multiple different topic areas with strict deadlines.



Area Ten is a global digital agency that services large corporations to fast-growing upstarts across Australia, Asia and North America. One of the keys to our success lies in the quality of our staff. We have a strict policy of no junior staff which means you’ll be working with the highest calibre of colleagues in the industries, hence there is a scope for ample opportunities to learn and develop.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



·You will have to:



*Acquire and review content briefs, ensuring alignment with client requirements. Develop and manage brand guides and templates to maintain consistency across all content

*Perform end-to-end content editing, from line edits to comprehensive copy edits, ensuring all content meets Area Ten's high standards and client specifications

*Provide constructive feedback to copywriters, manage revisions, and update content based on client feedback to refine and perfect deliverables

*Work closely with a team of editors and content creators, sharing insights and strategies to enhance content quality and workflow efficiency

*Help manage our content database, which requires regular upkeep on the progress of content projects across multiple clients



REQUIREMENTS



*Strong background in content editing and proofreading, preferably within a digital agency setting.

*Exceptional attention to detail and a keen eye for grammatical and stylistic errors. Must be committed to following style guidelines such as the Australian Government Style Manual and the Associated Press Stylebook, 2019.

*Must have a high-speed internet connection and a laptop with high specifications.

*A degree in journalism, communications, or a related field is preferred.

*The resource will also have to experiment with various AI tools and produce quality SEO content for our partner clients. This is a full-time role and involves closely working with the other editors and the rest of the team.



Mandate Requirement: The candidate should have a high-speed internet connection and a laptop with high computer specifications.



Please note: You will have to complete 1 copy test and 1 proofreading exercise as a part of the interview process.



ELIGIBILITY:



· Proofreading: 2 years (Required)



· Copywriting: 5 years (Required)



HOW TO APPLY:



If you’re interested in a role with us, please answer this:



Job Type: Full-time, Permanent



Benefits:



Work from home

title: Amazon FBA logistics assistant
description:
INNELS is a full-service Marketplace Agency helping European and US brands grow and scale on Amazon, TikTok Shop, and other marketplaces.



We are currently looking for Amazon Logistics Assistant to join our team. Experience with Amazon FBA & FBM is a must.



Responsibilities:

- Assist in the day-to-day management of Amazon FBA and FBM logistics operations.

- Create and manage Amazon FBA shipping plans in Seller Central.

- Coordinate shipments with suppliers, freight forwarders, and warehouses.

- Monitor FBA inventory levels and maintain healthy stock levels across marketplaces.

- Perform inventory forecasting and restocking planning based on sales data.

- Track and analyze Amazon FBA fees and identify potential cost optimizations.

- Monitor inbound shipments and resolve issues such as delays, discrepancies, or receiving problems.

- Manage FBM orders and ensure proper fulfillment operations.

- Maintain operational tracking files and reports using Excel.

- Support logistics coordination across multiple Amazon marketplaces, particularly EU markets.



Requirements:

- Experience working with Amazon Seller Central, specifically with FBA and FBM operations.

- Hands-on experience creating and managing FBA shipping plans.

- Understanding of Amazon logistics workflows, including inbound shipments, fulfillment processes, and inventory management.

- Experience with inventory forecasting and stock planning.

- Strong understanding of FBA fees and operational cost structures.

- Experience working with EU Amazon marketplaces is highly preferred.

- Strong Excel skills for inventory tracking, logistics reports, and operational planning.

- Strong organizational and operational skills.

- Data-driven mindset with ability to interpret logistics and inventory data.



How To Apply:

- Please send your CV

- Please describe your previous experience with Amazon FBA, FBM



We would like to start with part-time and then switch to full-time in the future.

title: Financial Controller (CPA or Senior Accountant) — US Manufacturing Company
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a hands-on Financial Controller / Senior Accountant to manage the accounting integrity for a US-based cookware manufacturing company. This role is focused on one core mission:

Maintain clean, accurate, and reliable financial records at all times.



You will work directly with a highly technical Fractional CFO to maintain and improve the company’s accounting systems, financial controls, and reporting processes.



This is not a simple bookkeeping role. We are looking for someone who takes pride in high-quality accounting, strong reconciliations, and fixing problems at the root cause.



Company Context

• US-based cookware manufacturer

• ~$5–10M annual revenue

• Inventory-driven manufacturing business

• Modern ERP system (ERPNext)

• Remote finance team



Core Responsibilities

You will be responsible for maintaining the accuracy and integrity of the accounting system. Key responsibilities include:

• Manage the monthly close process and ensure financial statements are accurate

• Maintain general ledger integrity and proper account classification

• Perform and review bank, credit card, and balance sheet reconciliations

• Maintain inventory and COGS accuracy within the ERP system

• Investigate and resolve accounting discrepancies

• Maintain strong audit trails and documentation

• Improve accounting processes and internal controls

• Work with the CFO to improve ERP workflows and accounting automation

• Coordinate with external accountants and tax advisors when needed



Required Qualifications

• CPA strongly preferred

• 5+ years experience in accounting or financial controllership roles

• Strong understanding of GAAP accounting principles

• Experience with inventory accounting or product-based businesses

• Strong reconciliation and financial close experience

• Hands-on ERP experience (ERPNext, NetSuite, SAP, Odoo, etc.)

• Excellent attention to detail and accounting discipline

• Ability to work independently and take ownership of accounting quality



Bonus Experience (Highly Valued)

• Experience with ERPNext

• Manufacturing accounting (inventory, WIP, BOMs, COGS)

• Experience improving accounting processes and controls

• Experience working with US-based companies



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

Within the first 3 months you will:

• Stabilize and improve the monthly close process

• Ensure all key balance sheet accounts are properly reconciled

• Improve inventory and COGS accounting accuracy

• Identify and resolve existing accounting inconsistencies

• Help improve ERPNext accounting workflows



What We Value

We are looking for someone who:

• Takes pride in clean, accurate accounting

• Investigates discrepancies instead of ignoring them

• Thinks in systems and processes

• Communicates clearly and proactively

• Wants to grow into a long-term finance leadership role



Application Instructions

To apply, please include:

1. Your CV

2. Your experience with ERP systems

3. Your experience with inventory accounting (if any)

Applications without this information may not be reviewed.

nts

title: Administrator, Group Support Services
description:
Administrator – ADVA Group Support Services



Full-time | Sydney AU hours | Competitive salary + growth opportunities



Applications close Friday, 20 March 2026 (unless filled earlier)



How your role makes a difference?

In your role as Administrator within Group Support Services, you play a critical part in supporting the efficient operation of the Group and its entities. You help ensure that administrative processes run smoothly by managing documentation, coordinating communications, and supporting key operational tasks across the organisation. Your attention to detail and strong organisational skills help maintain accuracy, consistency, and efficiency in day-to-day activities. With strong organisational skills and a self-starter attitude, you support the smooth running of day-to-day operations by ensuring tasks, documentation, and communications are well coordinated and managed efficiently. Your ability to maintain structure and attention to detail helps the team operate effectively, allowing partners and staff to focus on delivering high-quality work and achieving the Group’s strategic objectives.



Key responsibilities you will have :

Practice & Operations Support

• Support the CEO, Practice and Operations Manager, and partners in the day-to-day administration and operation of the Group’s entities.

• Support day-to-day operations by maintaining organised data, filing systems, and accurate record keeping.

• Prepare and maintain internal reports and assist with regular reporting requirements across the Group.

• Maintain key operational trackers and internal calendars to support team coordination and planning.

• Assist with coordinating operational initiatives, internal updates, and process improvements where required.

• Manage client enquiries, schedule meetings, and maintain a professional client experience.

• Assist with client administration processes including file management, document organisation, and maintaining accurate client records.

• Maintain and update practice management systems, templates, and internal documentation.

• Prepare agendas, minutes, correspondence, and briefing materials to support meetings and operational activities.



Administrative & Office Management

• Manage shared inboxes and respond to enquiries from internal and external stakeholders, escalating matters where appropriate.

• Develop and maintain organised filing systems, databases, spreadsheets, and administrative systems.

• Coordinate internal meetings and assist with general team administration and planning activities.

• Provide general administrative support across the team, including assisting with internal priorities, office coordination, and team initiatives.

• Manage office supplies, facilities coordination, and liaise with external service providers where required.



Finance Administration

• Assist with invoice preparation, billing administration, and debtor follow-ups.

• Support month-end reporting processes and general finance administration tasks.

• Monitor work in progress (WIP) reporting and assist with tracking billable activities where required.

• Ensure timesheets are submitted by tea
mbers and maintain accurate timesheet reporting.





Experience and Qualifications

To be successful in this role, the ideal candidate will have the following experience and qualifications:



• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Project Management, or a related field.

• Minimum of 2 years previous experience in an administrative, practice support, or operations support role within a professional services environment (e.g. accounting, legal, consulting, or advisory).

• Strong organisational and time management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to interact professionally with clients and internal stakeholders.

• High level of attention to detail and accuracy in documentation, record keeping, and reporting.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint) and confidence working with business systems and databases.

• Experience working with business systems and collaboration tools such as Podio, Slack, Asana, and similar workflow or project management platforms.

• Experience managing administrative systems, document management, and internal reporting processes.

• Ability to work proactively, take initiative, and operate effectively in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to collaborate across teams and business units.

• A positive, professional attitude with a strong commitment to supporting team success and operational efficiency.



What it means to work at the adva.group 

Working at adva.group means being part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization that values innovation and collaboration. Our team is made up of highly skilled and experienced professionals who are committed to delivering exceptional results for our clients. We offer a supportive and inclusive work environment where tea
mbers are encouraged to grow and develop their skills and careers. 



At the adva.group, we are dedicated to making a positive impact on the businesses and communities we serve, and we strive to create a culture of excellence in everything we do.

title: Project & Operations Manager | Content Podcast Production

This role is responsible for managing the workflow across multiple client podcasts each week, ensuring projects move smoothly from recording to publishing while maintaining clear communication with both our internal team and clients.



The ideal candidate understands content marketing, podcast production workflows, and project management systems, and can confidently manage multiple moving parts while keeping projects on schedule.



Responsibilities



• Manage and oversee up to 10 client podcasts per week from recording through publishing

• Coordinate production timelines for editing, graphics, show notes, and distribution

• Organize project workflows and task assignments inside Asana

• Communicate daily with the production team through Slack

• Provide clear updates and communication with clients regarding timelines and deliverables

• Ensure all podcast assets are delivered on time and meet quality standards

• Track deadlines, approvals, and revisions across multiple projects

• Maintain organized workflows and help improve production processes as the team grows

• Keep the entire production pipeline running smoothly week to week



Requirements



• Experience managing podcast production or content marketing projects

• Strong experience with Asana project management workflows

• Comfortable working in Slack-based team communication environments

• Excellent client communication and coordination skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

• Experience working with content teams, editors, designers, and producers



Preferred Experience



• Podcast production management

• Content marketing agencies or media companies

• YouTube or video podcast workflows

• Social media content repurposing workflows



What Success Looks Like



• Up to 10 client podcasts per week managed smoothly

title: Lead Generation & Apollo.io Expert
description:
We’re The Cultivator, an Australian-based agency scaling local and high-ticket service businesses across Australia, the US, and beyond. We’re currently looking for an Apollo Expert who can confidently handle full 
 setup and help us build a solid outbound system.



In this role, you’ll be responsible for setting up Apollo from scratch, including domain setup, inbox connections, lead sourcing, list building, sequences, and basic deliverability best practices. Your goal is to ensure our outbound campaigns are clean, organized, and ready to scale.



We’re looking for someone who knows Apollo inside and out, understands outbound workflows, and can work independently with minimal supervision. Experience with cold
 systems, CRM syncing, and lead generation is a big plus.



You don’t need to be a salesperson  but you do need to be detail-oriented, reliable, and confident in Apollo setup and execution. If you’ve done Apollo setups for agencies or service-based businesses before, we definitely want to hear from you.



We’re a remote-first team with strong support in the Philippines, so onboarding will be smooth. What matters most to us is that you’re proactive, eager to learn, and can deliver clean, working systems.



To apply, head over to thecultivator.co/applynow. Upload your CV and book an interview call with our team. Make sure to select ‘Apollo / Lead Generation’ as your preferred role.



We’re excited to work with you and get our outbound systems dialed in. Let’s grow together.

title: Book- keeper
description:
About Us

We are an e-commerce startup. As we grow, we are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented bookkeeper to join our remote team and help us maintain clean, accurate financial records.



Role Summary

We are seeking an experienced QuickBooks Bookkeeper with at least 5 years of hands-on bookkeeping experience. You will be responsible for maintaining our day-to-day financial records, reconciling accounts, managing payables and receivables, and providing timely financial reports to support business decisions.



Requirements

• Minimum 5 years of professional bookkeeping experience

• Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online (QBO) — certification is a strong plus

• Strong understanding of accounts payable/receivable, bank reconciliation, and financial reporting

• Familiarity with ecommerce payment gateways (PayPal, Stripe, etc.) and their reconciliation

• Experience with sales tax compliance and multi-state or international tax basics

• High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines with minimal supervision

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home office setup

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English





What We Offer

• Flexible working hours (with availability overlap required for check-ins)

• Supportive and collaborative team environment

• Opportunity to grow with the company as we scale



How to Apply

To apply, please submit the following:

• Your updated resume or CV

• A brief cover letter explaining your relevant bookkeeping experience, specifically with ecommerce businesses and QuickBooks



Applications that do not meet the 5-year experience requirement or lack QuickBooks experience will not be considered. We look forward to hearing from qualified candidates!

description:
AutoCAD Draftsperson/Autodesk Inventor



Job Description



A US-based manufacturing company is looking for a qualified AutoCAD draftsperson to join our team. We are a recognized leader in the design and manufacture of ergonomic, interactive technical products for various industries.

Our customers include medical/healthcare, public safety/mission control, all government agencies, IT, and cleanroom ergonomic products.



Required Professional Skills:

Produce accurate 2D and 3D shop drawings to adequately show and dimension all machined sheet metal welded, assembly parts, part numbers, specifications for bends, welding, assembly, etc.

Drafting and design responsibilities would include incorporating modifications into existing designs, developing component models and scaling fabrication drawings from initial concept.

Evaluate existing designs and processes and provide recommendations for improving productivity and increasing efficiency throughout.

Experience in sheet metal fabrication and machine shop environment is preferred

Experience in metal casting and plastic molding is an advantage.

Follow verbal and written instructions



Schedule: Monday to Friday, from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. US EST, with a one-hour lunch break



NOTE: Please read!!!

Please send a link to your resume in PDF or Word format and your Teams account. Please submit your application if you are proficient in Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D.

title: Project Manager - Construction Job Tracking & Controls
description:

Risk assessments and SWMS tracking



Toolbox talks register



Site inductions register



Daily sign-in / sign-out sheets



Project timelines and milestones



Labour and subcontractor tracking



Cost tracking (budget vs actuals)



Variations and change management



Notes, actions, and project updates



Ensure the workbook aligns with construction and WHS requirements



Design the workbook to be user-friendly for site and office use



Ensure the system provides clear accountability and progress visibility per job



Work with management to tailor the workbook to suit business and project needs



Provide guidance on how the workbook should be used throughout the lifecycle of a job



Required Experience & Skills



Proven experience as a Project Manager within the construction industry



Strong understanding of site safety documentation and compliance requirements



High-level skills in Excel / Google Sheets or similar tracking tools



Experience building practical job tracking or reporting systems



Strong attention to detail and ability to structure complex information clearly



Role Expectations



Focused on creating a practical, real-world job control tool, not just a template



Deliverable-driven role with clear outputs



System must be scalable and reusable across multiple projects



Suitable for a freelancer or contractor with construction project experience

title: Management & Business Process Analyst (Construction & Insurance)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Management & Business Process Analyst to lead the design, documentation, and full implementation of our business systems and workflows. This is a comprehensive, hands-on role requiring proven experience in building structured processes within construction and/or insurance-based businesses.



This role is full-time and will involve analysing our current operations, identifying gaps and inefficiencies, and implementing improved systems across the entire organisation.



Key Responsibilities



Review and analyse current business operations and job management processes



Design, document, and implement end-to-end systematic workflows across all departments



Create, update, and maintain staff processes and standard operating procedures (SOPs)



Develop onboarding frameworks and structured training documentation for new and existing staff



Design and implement organisational structure charts, role responsibilities, and reporting lines



Review and improve current job management systems and workflows, introducing new ideas and best-practice processes



Establish consistent document control, including folder structures, file naming conventions, and version control



Ensure all safety documentation, compliance records, and operational policies are current, organised, and correctly implemented



Work closely with management to align processes with business goals, growth plans, and compliance requirements



Oversee full implementation of all processes, ensuring adoption by staff (not documentation only)



Required Experience & Skills



Proven experience in business process analysis, operations management, or systems implementation



Strong background in construction, insurance, or trade-based businesses (highly preferred)



Demonstrated ability to implement complete systems from concept through to execution



Experience creating SOPs, training manuals, workflows, and organisational frameworks



Strong analytical skills with the ability to identify inefficiencies and recommend practical improvements



High level of organisation, attention to detail, and accountability



Ability to manage multiple workstreams and deliver structured outcomes



Role Expectations



This is a senior, in-depth role, not a junior or task-based position



Requires full ownership of process design, documentation, and implementation



Expected to challenge existing processes and introduce improved systems where appropriate



Requires active involvement until processes are embedded and operating effectively



Suitable for a freelancer or consultant able to commit full-time hours for the duration of the project

title: Social Media Manager & Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



Marketing Munster is a growing marketing and business development agency based in Los Angeles. We work with small businesses across industries including restaurants, automotive, local services, and e-commerce.



We are looking for a Social Media Manager & Graphic Designer who can help support our clients with content creation, graphics, and day-to-day social media activities.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys creative work, wants to grow their marketing skills, and is looking for a long-term opportunity with a small but growing agency.



Responsibilities

• Design graphics for social media posts, stories, ads, printed material, etc

• Create and schedule social media content

• Assist with caption writing and content ideas

• Help manage posts across platforms such as Instagram,
, TikTok, and LinkedIn

• Support basic brand design tasks for client projects

• Organize social media calendars and content folders

• Occasionally assist with other marketing or creative tasks



Preferred Skills

• Experience with Canva, Photoshop, or similar design tools

• Basic understanding of social media platforms

• Ability to follow brand guidelines and design styles

• Organized and able to meet deadlines

• Good written English for captions and communication



Bonus Skills (Not Required)

• Video editing

• Experience scheduling posts with tools like Buffer, Later, Loomly, or similar

• Experience working with marketing agencies



What We Offer

• Flexible working hours

• Opportunity to work with multiple brands and industries

• Long-term opportunity as the agency grows

• Ability to learn and grow your marketing skills



To help us understand your experience, please answer the following questions when applying:

1. Please share 3 examples of social media graphics or posts you have created.

2. If you were managing social media for a small business like a restaurant or local service company, how would you plan content for the week?

3. What tools do you typically use for graphic design and social media scheduling?

4. When designing graphics for a brand, how do you make sure your designs match the brand style?

5. If you were given a task like “create posts for this week,” what steps would you take from start to finish?

6. When working remotely, how do you manage your time and make sure tasks are completed without constant supervision?

7. Tell us about a time you helped grow a social media account or improved engagement.

8. If you do not understand a task or instructions, what do you usually do?

9. What type of work do you enjoy most: graphic design, social media management, or both?

10. Please include the word **Munster** in your application so we know you read the full job post.



Design for print is different from designing graphics for social media.



If you were asked to design something that will be printed (such as a flyer, menu, poster, or banner), how do you make sure the final design will print clearly and not appear pixelated or low quality?



Please explain the steps you would take and what file settings you would check before delivering the final design.

title: Community Manager
description:
ABOUT SAN SOUND

SAN Sound is a gaming audio hardware company dedicated to delivering immersive sound experiences for gamers worldwide. Our growing community of passionate audio enthusiasts and gamers is at the heart of everything we do. As we expand into new markets across the US and Asia, we’re looking for someone who lives and breathes online culture to be the voice and heartbeat of our community.



THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Community Manager who genuinely loves being online — someone who thrives on conversation, builds real relationships with community members, and wakes up excited to check in on 
. You’ll be the primary point of contact between SAN Sound and our community across 
, social media, forums, and anywhere else our customers gather. This is a role for someone who doesn’t just manage a community — they energize it.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Community Engagement: Engage daily with community members across 
, social media platforms, forums, and other channels where SAN Sound customers congregate

• Relationship Building: Build authentic relationships with community members, becoming a trusted and recognizable presence that people look forward to interacting with

• Events & Activations: Plan, organize, and execute online events, giveaways, contests, and interactive activities that drive engagement and strengthen community bonds

• Strategy & Analytics: Develop and implement community growth strategies, analyzing engagement metrics and adjusting approaches to continually improve participation and sentiment

• Community Standards: Create and maintain community guidelines, standards, and a governance framework that fosters a positive, inclusive, and thriving environment

• Moderation & Governance: Exercise moderation authority thoughtfully — knowing when to enforce rules firmly and when to guide conversations with a lighter touch

• Cross-Team Collaboration: Act as the voice of the community internally, collaborating with the marketing team to relay feedback, surface trends, and inform product and content decisions

• Campaign Support: Work closely with the marketing team to align community initiatives with broader brand campaigns and product launches

• Support Triage: Triage customer issues that surface in community channels, ensuring they are documented and routed to the customer support team for resolution

• Reporting: Monitor community sentiment and compile regular reports on engagement trends, key conversations, and community health metrics

• Growth & KPIs: Own community growth KPIs including engagement rates, member growth, retention, and event participation. Set realistic, data-driven goals after understanding the tools and resources available, and consistently work toward hitting and exceeding them.



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

• Born Online: You love being online. Not as a chore — it’s where you naturally spend your time. You’re the person who’s always in the chat, always starting conversations, always making people feel welcome.

• Proven Experience: 2+ years of experience managing online communities for a brand, with a proven track record of growing and nurturing engaged audiences

• Gaming & Audio Enthusiast: A real passion for gaming and audio — you understand the culture, the language, and what gets gamers excited

• Excellent Communicator: Excellent written English communication skills with the ability to adapt your tone from professional to casual depending on the platform and context

• Creative & Proactive: Naturally creative with ideas for events, content hooks, giveaways, and ways to spark conversation

• Positive Energy: A warm, positive presence that lifts up the community. You’re the kind of person who makes a server feel alive.

• Confident Moderator: Comfortable holding authority in a community — setting boundaries, enforcing standards, and making tough calls when necessary, all while maintaining trust and respect

• Analytical Mindset: Ability to think strategically about community growth and translate engagement data into actionable insights

• Goal-Oriented: Confident in your ability to drive measurable engagement growth. You can assess available resources, set realistic KPIs, and hold yourself accountable to hitting them.



NICE TO HAVE

• Experience with 
 server management tools and bots (MEE6, Carl-bot, etc.)

• Familiarity with social media management platforms (Hootsuite, Buffer, Sprout Social, or similar)

• Experience working with gaming or consumer electronics brands

• Understanding of the Philippine and/or Asian gaming communities

• Experience building communities from the ground up or revitalizing declining ones

• Basic familiarity with analytics tools (Google Analytics, social platform insights)



WHY SAN SOUND?

• Be the voice of a growing gaming audio brand with a passionate customer base

• Fully remote position with flexible working arrangements

• Direct impact on community culture and brand perception

• Collaborative marketing team that values your ideas and input

• Opportunity to grow with the company as we expand into new markets

title: Digital Marketing VA
description:
Position: Senior Marketing Lead

Salary: Competitive and negotiable based on experience

Contract: Full-time, long-term (40 hours weekly), fully remote

Work Hours: 4 PM – 1 AM Manila Time, Monday to Friday (Weekends Off)



APPLY HERE:



Applications are accepted via our Google Form only. The most important part of your application is your 90-second video introduction. The form also includes questions to assess your skills and fit.



Applications without a video will not be considered.





OVERVIEW



We are a small, specialist B2B technology company based in the UK and a certified Google Cloud partner. We sell software products and professional services to businesses and schools, mainly in the UK and US.



You will be our only dedicated marketer. There is a small team around you who can help with execution, but *you are the person who makes sure things get done*. You will plan, brief, create, and report — week in, week out. You will work directly with the CEO and be trusted to run marketing independently within agreed goals.



This is a long-term role ideally suited to someone aged 30–42 who has real B2B marketing experience behind them, enjoys variety, takes ownership naturally, and thrives when no two weeks look the same.





WHAT YOU WILL OWN



1. Content and SEO — minimum 2 blog posts per week across two B2B websites. You do not have to write every post but you must make sure every post gets written, edited, and published on time.



2. AI Engine Optimisation (AEO) — we need to appear when business buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews about the problems we solve. You will structure content to make that happen and run monthly visibility checks.



3. YouTube channel and video — we are moving our website to a video-first format and this is a core part of the role. Our technical team records product demos. You brief them, manage the edit and publish process, run the YouTube channel, and lead the rollout of video across our web pages. You will also produce or direct short clips for LinkedIn and site embeds (around 4–8 per month to start).



4. Competitor monitoring — set up alerts, keep our comparison pages current, and update them quickly when competitors change pricing or positioning.



5.
 newsletter and LinkedIn — your channels to grow and maintain consistently.



6. Google Workspace partner community — other GWS partners and resellers should know who we are. Being visible in the right communities is a genuine competitive advantage and something we expect you to own.



7. Sales collateral — one-pagers and battlecards per product line. Write them or project manage them through the team.



8. Weekly update to the CEO and monthly KPI review.





KEY REQUIREMENTS



1. MINIMUM 5 years of hands-on marketing experiencei — this is a hard requirement, please do not apply if you do not meet it

2. Strong writer — clear, punchy, outcome-focused, no corporate fluff

3. Natural project manager who gets things done through people as well as themselves

4. Highly organised with a proven system for managing multiple workstreams at once

5. Daily user of AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity etc.) — be ready to talk about this specifically

6. Solid SEO knowledge and genuine interest in AI search and AEO

7. Strong hands-on experience creating and producing marketing videos — this is essential.

8. Experience managing or directing a YouTube channel and video distribution

9. Deep working knowledge of Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Sites etc.) — we are a Google Cloud partner and you must be able to speak about GWS products credibly and confidently

10. Commercially minded — you track leads and pipeline, not just traffic and likes

11. Excellent written and spoken English

12. Professional home office setup for video calls





DESIRABLE



1. Experience marketing to US US enterprise buyers

2. Active presence in Google Workspace or Google Cloud partner communities

3. GA4 certified or strong hands-on Google Analytics experience





THE RIGHT FIT FOR OUR TEAM



1. Aged 30–42 with solid hands-on marketing experience — not at the start of your career

2. Seeking a long-term career, not a short-term gig

3. Self-motivated and productive when working independently

4. Comfortable reporting directly to a CEO and being trusted to get on with it

5. Energised by variety — strategy one day, writing the next, briefing a developer the day after

6. Honest, direct, and solutions-focused





WHAT WE OFFER



1. Long-term role with a stable, growing company

2. Direct collaboration with the CEO from day one

3. Genuine ownership — this is your marketing function to build and run

4. Competitive salary with annual review

5. Fully remote with weekends off

6. A role where your work is visible and your impact is measurable





TECHNICAL SETUP REQUIREMENTS



1. Computer: Minimum Intel i5 or Ryzen 5 (or equivalent), 8GB RAM, SSD storage

2. Internet: Minimum 30 Mbps stable connection with a backup option

3. Equipment: USB headset with noise cancellation, HD webcam, professional home office setup





HOW TO APPLY



Submit your application here:



Your application must include:

1. A 90-second personal introduction video (landscape, professional appearance, clear English)

2. Why this role fits where you are right now

3. Two or three examples of B2B marketing work you are proud of (links are fine)

4. How you use AI tools in your marketing work today — be specific



We will respond to every application. We will not ghost you.



APPLY HERE:

title: Cinematic Tutorial Video Creator (Can Use Existing Tutorials as Reference)
description:
Cinematic Tutorial Video Creator (Can Use Existing Tutorials as Reference)



I’m looking for someone who can create cinematic, easy-to-follow how-to tutorial videos in a polished, professional style.



Main reference style:

youtu.be/gqO4dWXV3Lk



These should not feel like raw screen recordings. I want videos with:

- clear teaching

- polished pacing

- cinematic editing

- professional and friendly narration

- good judgment about what should be explained, what can be skipped, and what should simply be shown



Topics

Tutorials for tools and platforms such as:

- OpenArt

- Vultr

- RoseHosting

- Cloudways

- ScalaHosting

- vast.ai

- Bluehost

- 

- Linode

- Pinecone

- and similar AI tools, hosting platforms, cloud tools, and technical SaaS products



Accounts and payment access will be provided.



Video Format

Each video should be delivered in:

- 16:9

- 4K



Video Structure

Each tutorial has 3 clear parts:



1) Avatar Intro (15–20 sec)

A short lip-synced avatar intro that explains what the video is about and what the viewer will achieve.



2) Main Tutorial Body (5–10 min)

This is the core part of the video.



It should show the actual process on screen using:

- screen recordings

- highlights / zooms / callouts where helpful

- supporting visuals when needed

- clear voiceover throughout most of the tutorial



This section should feel polished, structured, easy to follow, and engaging to watch.



3) Avatar Outro (15–20 sec)

A short lip-synced avatar outro that wraps up the tutorial.



Workflow

1. I share a Google Sheet

The Google Sheet contains a short brief for each video, usually just 3–4 simple sentences describing:

- the tool

- the goal

- the result the viewer should get



Example:

“Deploy a simple app on Vultr. Launch a server. Connect to it. Complete the basic setup so the app is live.”



2. Sometimes I may also share an existing YouTube tutorial as a base reference

In those cases, you do not need to recreate the full script completely from scratch.

You can use the existing tutorial as inspiration or a starting point, then improve the structure, clarity, pacing, and final presentation.



3. You turn the brief into a full tutorial structure and script

Based on the Google Sheet brief and any reference material, you d
:

- the best step-by-step flow

- what to explain

- what not to explain

- what should be shown visually

- what belongs in the avatar intro, the main tutorial body, and the avatar outro



4. I review and approve the script



5. You record the voiceover

For the paid trial, this should be your own real voice.



6. You create the avatar intro and outro

These should be lip-synced and match the approved script.



7. You produce the main tutorial body

This includes:

- recording the tutorial on screen

- showing the process clearly

- adding supporting visuals where useful

- editing the video so it feels polished and cinematic



8. You deliver the final files via Google Drive

Final delivery includes:

- polished 16:9 4K video

- clean SRT subtitles



What matters most

I’m not looking for just a video editor.



I’m looking for someone who can take a short brief or an existing base tutorial and turn it into a tutorial that is:

- clear

- structured

- professional

- friendly

- engaging to watch



You should understand how to explain technical tools well:

- what matters

- what does not matter

- what should be shown on screen

- what should be said in the voiceover

- how to keep the viewer from getting confused



There should usually be narration throughout the tutorial.

Silence is only okay when the viewer needs to focus on a visual or audio demo 
nt.



Paid Trial

- $40 paid trial

- Trial is paid only if the quality is around 90% similar to the reference style



Ongoing Work

- If it works well: around 16 videos per month



To Apply

Please send all 3:



1. A link to a how-to tutorial you created

Relevant examples include:

- SaaS tutorials

- hosting tutorials

- server / cloud tutorials

- AI tool tutorials

- software setup tutorials



2. Confirm that you can record your own voiceover for the paid trial



3. Your CV

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
JOB RESPONSIBILITIES INCLUDE BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO:

Short-Form Video Editing (Primary)

*Edit 5–20+ short-form videos per day optimized for TikTok and TikTok Shop

*Edit short video/audio podcast (2 episodes a month)

*Create tight, fast-paced edits where cuts feel natural and almost unnoticeable

*Incorporate:

**Multiple camera angles

**Product close-ups

**Usage demonstrations

**On-screen text and captions that improve retention and conversions

*Enhance videos to match a more premium, brand-friendly aesthetic (lighting, color, polish)

*Adapt edits to current TikTok creative trends and algorithm preferences

*Utilize preferred settings in CapCut and suggest others that would make content better



Creative Input & Optimization

*Provide creative suggestions such as:

**What shots are missing

**When pacing needs to be faster

**When structure should change to improve hook and retention

*Help improve content quality and viewer retention over time, not just execute instructions



Fast Turnaround & Workflow

*Deliver edits on very tight timelines, often within 24 hours

*Organize files, exports, and versions efficiently

*Work within a fast-changing content schedule that may shift daily



AI-Assisted Editing & Localization (Future Phase)

*Learn and use AI tools to:

**Speed up editing workflows

**Assist with repurposing content

**Support future Spanish-language versions using AI voice and lip-sync tools (training provided)

*Follow new AI-based workflows as systems are implemented



Cross-Platform Repurposing (Secondary)

*Prepare videos for reposting on:

**Instagram Reels

*
 Reels

*Maintain correct formats, captions, and technical specs per platform



EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS REQUIRED:

*3+ years of video production experience

*Experience with remote team tools like Time Doctor, Slack, Trello, Google Suite, LastPass,
 and Zoom

*Excellent English skills, and able to communicate well both verbally and in writing

*Proven expertise in editing short-form TikTok content, preferably using CapCut (not YouTube-style long-form videos)

*Strong understanding of:

**TikTok pacing and hooks

**Product-driven storytelling

**TikTok Shop style content

*Ability to edit:

**Talking-head videos

**Product demos

**Lifestyle shots

**Voiceover videos

*Strong eye for:

**Timing

**Visual flow

**Brand presentation

*Content that converts sales and retains viewers

*Comfortable working in a high-volume, fast-paced environment

*Open to learning and using AI tools to improve efficiency

*Excellent organization and file management



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i7 or equivalent with 16gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 100 MBPS Download speed



Job Type: Part-Time (potentially move into full-time depending on business needs and performance ) - 4 hours daily / 20 hours weekly

Schedule: 3PM-7PM EST M-F // 4AM-8AM PHT

Salary Range: PHP 30,000- PHP 40,000 monthly, Depending on experience

title: Sales Funnel builder (E-Commerce)
description:
Experienced Funnel Builder Needed for High-Converting Dropshipping Funnels



I am looking for an experienced Funnel Builder to create high-converting sales funnels for my dropshipping business.

Your main responsibility will be building conversion-optimized product funnels based on proven structures, including product pages, checkout pages, upsells, order bumps, and thank-you pages.



Responsibilities:

-Build complete sales funnels in Funnelish

-Create clean, persuasive product pages (strong headlines, clear structure, optimized layout)

-Set up upsells, order bumps, and thank-you pages

-Implement trust elements such as reviews, guarantees, badges, and social proof

-Ensure funnels are mobile-optimized and fast-loading



What I Provide:

-The product and target audience

-A clear funnel structure and guidance

-Copy inspiration and examples if needed



Requirements:

-Proven experience building sales funnels for dropshipping or e-commerce

-Strong Funnelish experience (REQUIRED)

-A conversion-focused mindset

-High attention to detail



Collaboration:

This project starts with one test funnel. If the results are strong, it can lead to long-term collaboration with ongoing funnel projects.



Important:

I work with performance-based bonuses. If your funnels perform well and deliver strong results, you will receive bonuses on top of your base pay.

title: Hr Representative
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a tech-savvy Entry-Level HR Representative to support day-to-day HR operations and serve as backup support for payroll and employee administration. This role is ideal for someone early in their HR career who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with systems and spreadsheets. You will assist with employee records, onboarding/offboarding, HR documentation, and basic payroll support while following clear processes and maintaining confidentiality.

Key Qualifications

•

0–2 years of HR/admin experience (internship/entry-level acceptable)

•

Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, Psychology, Accounting/Finance, or related field (preferred)

•

Strong Excel skills (filters, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP basics, pivot tables preferred)

•

Comfortable learning HR/payroll systems (QuickBooks, UKG, or similar)

•

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow standardized processes

•

Professional written and verbal English communication

•

High discretion and ability to handle sensitive employee information

Essential Responsibilities

•

Support onboarding/offboarding tasks (checklists, document collection, account access coordination)

•

Maintain employee records and personnel file organization (digital filing, completeness checks)

•

Assist with benefits administration support (enrollment changes, tracking, employee follow-ups)

•

Support payroll preparation tasks (data gathering, timesheet checks, basic reconciliation support)

•

Help prepare HR reports and trackers (headcount, PTO tracking, compliance checklists)

•

Respond to routine employee questions and route complex issues to HR leadership

•

Support HR compliance documentation and audit readiness (organized records, timely updates)

•

Coordinate recruiting logistics as needed (scheduling, applicant tracking updates)

•

Identify process gaps and suggest improvements to templates, trackers, and workflows

Core Competencies Required for All Positions

We are seeking dedicated professionals who embody the following qualities:

•

Collaborative Professional: Collaborates effectively with colleagues, supports team goals, and contributes to a positive work environment while taking ownership of projects with respect and professionalism. Identifies opportunities for improvement, acts proactively without constant direction, and treats all stakeholders with dignity and courtesy

•

Strong Problem-Solving Skills: Analyzes complex situations, identifies root causes, and develops creative solutions

•

Resilient and Determined: Maintains composure and productivity during high-stress situations and tight deadlines; approaches challenges with optimism, flexibility, and unwavering determination. Does not give up easily and demonstrates the resilience needed to overcome obstacles and find effective solutions

•

Company-Focused: Demonstrates genuine commitment to organizational mission and takes pride in contributing to company success and growth

•

Fluency in English: Excellent written and verbal communication skills; able to articulate ideas clearly and professionally

Technical & Schedule Requirements

•

Reliable high-speed internet connection with consistent Wi-Fi stability

•

Laptop with sufficient memory and processing power to handle job-specific tasks and software

•

Availability to work night shift hours: 12:00 AM to 9:00 AM

Compensation:

Competitive contractor rate, based on experience and qualifications

Probationary Period & Performance Review:

3-Month Probationary Period: All contractors begin with a 3-month probationary period. At the end of this period, a comprehensive performance review will be conducted. Based on performance evaluation, salary adjustments and contract continuation will be determined.

title: eClinicalWorks (eCW) Implementation Expert / Workflow Architect – Pain Management
description:
JOB OVERVIEW:

We are a U.S. Pain Management Clinic looking for a true eClinicalWorks (eCW) implementation expert.



This is NOT a trainee role and NOT a basic eCW user role.



We are looking for someone who has personally built eCW workflows from scratch and can think like an architect — not someone who only follows an existing workflow.



You must have real hands-on experience with:

- Smart Forms

- templates

- order sets

- workflow design and optimization

- eCW v11 or v12

- improving clinic efficiency and reducing clicks



Strong preference for candidates who have experience with:

- Pain Management templates (HPI, Physical Exam, Assessment/Plan)

- procedure order sets

- mid-office workflow design

- referral and schedule workflow improvements

- CPT explosion

- mandatory diagnosis rules

- claim scrubbing / denial prevention rules



Ideal candidate:

- has done real eCW implementation or optimization work before

- can design the workflow, not just follow it

- can explain exactly what they personally built

- can show redacted/de-identified examples or do a live walkthrough

- has worked for eClinicalWorks, an implementation team, or a specialized RCM/consulting firm



DO NOT APPLY IF:

- you only used eCW as a front desk staff member, MA, scribe, scheduler, or biller

- you need someone else to tell you what to build

- you have never created Smart Forms, templates, or order sets from scratch

- you cannot clearly describe your implementation experience



PROJECT DETAILS:

- Less than 30 hours/week

- 1 to 3 month project to start

- Ongoing work possible for the right person

- Paid working interview / test task required



HOW TO APPLY:

Put ECW ARCHITECT in the first line of your application and answer ALL of these:



1. How many years of hands-on eCW implementation experience do you have?

2. What Smart Forms, templates, order sets, or workflows have you personally built?

3. Have you built anything for pain management or procedure-based clinics?

4. Which eCW versions have you worked in?

5. Have you worked for eClinicalWorks, an implementation firm, or an RCM company?

6. Can you show redacted/de-identified examples of your work?

7. Are you willing to do a paid working interview or test task?

8. What hourly rate do you want within the $8-$15 range?



Only experienced candidates with real build/implementation experience will be considered.

title: Google Ads & Meta Ads Specialist – Lead Generation Agency | Part-Time Remote (15-30 hrs/week)
description:
We are looking for a Digital Marketing Specialist based in the Philippines to take full ownership of paid advertising for our clients across Google Ads and Meta Ads 
 & Instagram). This is a part-time remote role with an Australian lead generation agency specialising in service-based businesses. If you enjoy data-driven marketing, improving campaign performance, and genuinely care about the results you deliver, this could be a great opportunity.



About Us



We are an Australian lead generation agency focused exclusively on helping service-based businesses grow through paid advertising. Our team is small and focused, and we take pride in delivering real results for our clients.



About the Role



This role is focused on paid search and paid social advertising for lead generation clients. You will take full ownership of campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads, with the goal of driving high-quality leads for service-based businesses. This is not a support role — we want someone who owns their campaigns, spots problems early, and is always looking for ways to improve performance. The role starts at 15 hours per week, primarily across Monday and Tuesday, with a clear path to 25-30 hrs within 3 months based on performance. Starting rate is $8 USD/hour with performance reviews at 3 and 6 months.



Key Responsibilities



You will manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns end to end, including search campaigns, retargeting campaigns, and Performance Max where applicable. This includes keyword research, writing and testing ad copy, bid and budget management, and identifying new opportunities. You will also manage Meta advertising campaigns across
 and Instagram, including audience setup, creative testing, ad copy, and ongoing optimisation to drive lead volume and quality. You will monitor performance across both platforms and communicate clearly on what is working, what isn't, and what you plan to do about it.



Skills and Experience



We are looking for someone who has hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns with a focus on lead generation, solid experience running Meta Ads campaigns, strong written English, and the ability to analyse data and make decisions based on it.

It is a bonus if you have experience with GoHighLevel including CRM, workflows, automations or landing page builds, GA4 and conversion tracking setup, or creating Meta ad creatives.



How to Apply



Please send a short description of your Google Ads experience, a short description of your Meta Ads experience, examples of campaigns or results you have achieved if available, and your availability and timezone. Please include the word BOOMERANG at the start of your application so we know you have read the full post.



Please also include an answer to the below questions within your application:



- Describe a Google Ads campaign you managed that wasn't performing. What did you diagnose and what actions did you take?

- What's your process for the first 2 weeks when taking over an existing account?

title: Online English Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Automation & Technical Operations Assistant (Zapier, QA)
description:
We are hiring a Part-Time Automation & Technical Operations Assistant to help maintain and improve the automation systems and integrations that power our gaming marketplace.



This role focuses primarily on automation management, technical troubleshooting, and QA testing, helping ensure our internal systems, integrations, and development projects run smoothly.



You will work closely with our internal team and developers, assisting with automation maintenance, testing new features, troubleshooting issues, and helping coordinate technical tasks across the business.



This is a long-term role starting part-time, with the opportunity to grow as our technical operations expand.



Responsibilities



Automation Management (Zapier)

• Monitor and troubleshoot Zapier automations when issues occur

 • Maintain and update existing Zapier workflows as products and processes change

 • Build new automation flows when needed

 • Ensure integrations between platforms continue working correctly

Examples of systems you may work with include:

• Zapier + Monday CRM

 • Zapier + WordPress / WooCommerce

 • Zapier + SendGrid

 • Zapier +
 notifications

 • AI by Zapier automations



Technical QA & Testing

• Test new features and updates implemented by developers

 • Identify bugs, inconsistencies, or workflow issues

 • Document problems clearly and report them to developers

 • Verify that issues have been properly resolved after fixes are deployed

Examples include testing:

• new marketplace features

 • seller dashboards

 • WooCommerce functionality

 • custom user role permissions

 • integrations between systems



Developer & Support Coordination

• Communicate with developers to track progress on development tasks

 • Help test and validate new changes before they go live

 • Report bugs or technical issues to developers and follow up on fixes

 • Communicate with external support teams when necessary (WordPress, WooCommerce, WPVIP, etc.)



Technical Operations Support

• Assist with maintaining integrations between different systems and platforms

 • Help manage technical accounts such as Google Workspace when needed

 • Assist with troubleshooting website or system issues

 • Provide general technical assistance across internal tools



Issue Tracking & Technical Communication

This role requires strong organizational and communication skills when working with developers and technical support teams.

You should be able to:

• Build and maintain clear systems for tracking issues, development tasks, and ongoing projects

 • Track multiple moving parts across automation workflows, development updates, and support threads

 • Maintain structured documentation so issues and progress are easy to follow

When reporting issues or feedback, communication must be clear, concise, and systematic.

This includes:

• Providing detailed explanations of issues

 • Including screenshots, recordings, or step-by-step examples when necessary

 • Clearly explaining how a bug occurred and how it can be reproduced

Because developer time is expensive, feedback should always be specific and well-structured to avoid unnecessary back-and-forth or miscommunication.

Strong candidates will be able to communicate technical problems efficiently and clearly, helping development tasks move forward quickly without repeated clarification.



Communication & Coordination

You will regularly communicate with our team and developers using:

•

 • Slack

 • D(i)scord

Clear communication and structured reporting are important for this role.



Requirements (Mandatory)

• Experience using Zapier

 • Strong troubleshooting and logical problem-solving ability

 • Excellent attention to detail

 • Ability to clearly document and explain technical issues

 • You must be highly organized and capable of creating your own systems for tracking tasks, issues, and development updates.

You should be comfortable understanding how different systems connect and interact with each other.



Preferred Experience (Not required but helpful)

• WordPress or WooCommerce familiarity

 • CRM systems such as 

 • Automation platforms or integrations

 • QA testing or software testing experience

 • Basic understanding of APIs or system integrations



How to Apply

Please include the following:

1) Introduction

A short introduction about yourself and your technical or automation experience.

2) Zapier Experience

Describe your experience with Zapier, including:

• automations you have built

 • systems you have connected

 • examples of troubleshooting issues

3) Example

Please describe one automation workflow you created or maintained, including:

• the trigger

 • the action(s)

 • what problem the automation solved

Finally, include the word “CACTUS” at the beginning of your application so we know you read this job post.

description:

services for large and bulky products.

This role is ideal for an engineer who thrives in a fast- paced, product-driven environment and is eager to take ownership of impact back-end services used across North America.

- Contribute to infrastructure and deployment processes leveraging Docker Swarm and Jenkins CI/CD pipelines . 

- Collaborate with frontend and mobile engineers to ensure seamless integration and data flow across platforms. 

- Lead and support the implementation of new features, services, and third-party integrations. 

- Work with MongoDB and PostgreSQL to design efficient, reliable, and scalable data layers. 

- Support modernization initiatives while maintaining selected legacy systems. 

- Write clean, testable, and maintainable code, adhering to industry best practices and internal standards. 

- Participate in architecture reviews, agile planning, and code reviews across the engineering organization. 

- Contribute to performance monitoring, issue diagnosis, and uptime improvements. 



Qualifications: 

- 3-4 years of backend development experience, ideally within product-focused or high-scale environments. 

- Proven expertise in Golang , with hands-on experience building and maintaining production services. 

- Working knowledge of Node.js is beneficial, particularly for contributing to legacy components. 

- Experience working with MongoDB and PostgreSQL in live, production settings. 

- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and containerized deployments (eg, Jenkins, Docker). 

- Strong understanding of RESTful API development and third-party system integration . 

- Solid grasp of backend architecture, microservices, security principles, and system scalability. 

- Comfortable working with both modern systems and legacy infrastructure. 

- Effective communicator, able to work asynchronously across global teams.



How to Apply:

Please send your updated resume and portfolio showcasing relevant experience to

 must be: “Senior Back-End Developer Application”
