title: English-fluent Property Sourcing VA (Calls required)
description:
Hi, I'm Terry! I run a team under Invested Escapes, a U.S.-based temporary housing provider that relocates displaced families whose homes are being repaired due to damage (fires, floods, etc.). We receive claims or "leads" from relocation specialists (RSs) at relocation companies and source, confirm, and propose suitable property options to the RS, who in turn present to the family in need of a temporary home. 



We are a top-closing team that is growing fast in workload so we're building a 24/7 network of sharp, reliable property sourcers. 



--- The Structure ---



This is a freelance, on-call role. When a claim comes in, we'll post it in a dedicated Sourcer Slack channel. Any sourcer that is available and can commit to an uninterrupted sourcing window messages to take it -- first come, first serve. 



Lead flow isn't always steady or enough to give a claim to each available sourcer, so this works best for someone who has other work too but is able to commit to a claim(s) when available and most of all, for someone who wants to earn on their own terms. 



--- What You'll Do ---



Once you accept a claim, you're responsible for the full sourcing round which includes:



* initial sourcing round where you find & reach out (via call/text) to a sufficient # of potentially viable property options 

* during/after initial sourcing, responding quickly to any landlords that respond and reviewing all property details to see if the property is a viable option 

* following up with landlords as needed and expanding the search if criteria shifts or all initially sourced options are unviable (i.e. landlord never replies, property doesn't fit critical criteria)

* delivering market research to us if no confirmed options are found within a reasonable time frame / effort 



Initial sourcing windows vary depending on complexity + sourcer speed but generally range 1-3 hours. Full sourcing (including responding to landlords, follow ups, adjusting to family feedback) can span multiple days/weeks but it will be “stop and go” (you come online to respond to landlords or search again, but you don’t have to wait online for hours in the meantime). 



You will use a time tracker for each task i.e. claim you take and are expected to honestly track your time using the “stop and go” feature of the tracker. 



--- What Makes You a Good Fit ---



* Fluent English (written and spoken)

* Extremely detail-oriented, thorough, and fast

* Self-motivated & critical thinker; if there are no perfect options, you figure out ways to make something reasonable work 

* Confident handling questions & objections and able to negotiate/be persuasive, when needed

* Reliable & responsive — when you commit to a claim, you follow through & are reachable

* Tech savvy (comfortable learning new software) & incredible multitasker (i.e. can take calls while also sourcing other options) 

* Quiet + distraction-free environment for calls 

* Available during U.S. hours, ideally some window in the EST day (9AM to 12AM); while we only receive claims during standard workhours, it is efficient to source after-hours as needed 



--- How You Get Paid ---



* Hourly pay for total time worked on a claim 

* Sizable one-time bonus (e.g. $50, potentially more) if the family selects your option



As lead flow grows, top performers will have the opportunity to move into a full-time role with higher pay and deeper involvement in the full claim lifecycle.



--- How to Apply ---



* Written intro — tell us something you do for fun and something that inspires / motivates you!

* Short video or audio intro in English

* Your general preferred availability and time zone

* Any relevant experience (research, sourcing, admin, phone-based roles)

* Include the phrase "water bottle" somewhere in your video or audio intro (not the written one)



--- When You'll Hear Back ---



If we think you're a good fit, we will aim to touch base within 1-2 weeks. 



Due to our workload and the number of applicants, we may not be able to respond to each applicant individually but we genuinely appreciate each application and your
. We know how frustrating it is if you don't hear back at all from a job but we respect any person who puts themselves out there (like you!) and will definitely keep you in mind as we keep expanding the team.

title: Program Coordinator
description:
Job description:



Senior Operations Coordinator (Virtual Assistant)



Quest Collective | Full-Time | Remote



About Quest Collective



Quest Collective is a fast-growing, mentoring-first NDIS provider supporting teens and young adults to become the hero of their own story. We specialise in high-quality mentoring, Supported Independent Living (SIL), and capacity-building supports for young people aged 13 to 40.



As we scale, we are building a highly structured, audit-ready operations engine. We are seeking a Senior Operations Coordinator (VA) who can take ownership of core operational workflows and keep our systems running with precision, compliance, and care.



This is not an entry-level admin role. We are looking for a senior operator who can think critically, act proactively, and maintain high standards without constant supervision.



Role Purpose



The Senior Operations Coordinator is responsible for the smooth, compliant, and accurate execution of daily operations across rostering, ShiftCare administration, invoicing support, payroll preparation, and compliance monitoring, rostering and scheduling.



You will act as a key operational backbone of the organisation, ensuring participant supports run smoothly and the business remains audit-ready at all times.

ShiftCare Systems Management



Maintain accurate participant and staff profiles

Monitor case note completion and quality

Ensure service agreements and funding data are current

Maintain clean, audit-ready digital records

Identify and resolve data discrepancies proactively

Communicate roster changes clearly and professionally

Escalate coverage risks early

Support SIL ratio integrity

Invoicing and Finance Support

Prepare accurate invoices for NDIA and plan managers

Export data to Xero

Check kilometres and line item accuracy

Flag billing anomalies early

Payroll Preparation (SCHADS Award Awareness)

Verify hours, sleepovers, and allowances

Maintain employee and contractor records

Support SCHADS Award alignment

Compliance and Audit Readiness

Track document expiries and send reminders

Maintain audit evidence folders

Support NDIS Practice Standards alignment

Assist with internal quality checks

Maintain incident and feedback registers

Communication and Team Support



Liaise professionally with mentors, coordinators, and leadership

Follow up incomplete documentation

Support onboarding workflows

Maintain warm, clear, and firm communication

Escalate risks and issues early

Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Minimum 2+ years experience working with the NDIS

Strong hands-on experience with ShiftCare

Proven rostering experience in disability, SIL, or community care

Solid understanding of NDIS line items and service delivery

Experience supporting invoicing and payroll workflows

Excellent written and verbal English

High attention to detail and accuracy

Strong time management and reliability

Ability to work autonomously in a remote environment

Highly Desirable



Experience with Xero

SIL operational experience

SCHADS Award familiarity

Experience in a fast-scaling NDIS provider

Previous senior VA or operations role

Process improvement mindset

Personal Attributes We Value



We are looking for someone who:



Takes ownership and follows through

Thinks ahead and prevents problems

Communicates calmly under pressure

Is highly organised and systems-driven

Notices small errors before they become big problems

Balances compliance with practical operations

Is proactive, not reactive

Genuinely cares about participant outcomes

AND, who loves to have a laugh & has a great attitude!



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Success in this role will be measured by:



Rosters filled and stable

Minimal shift gaps

Timesheets processed accurately and on time

Invoices submitted without errors

Compliance dashboard maintained at 100% currency

Minimal payroll corrections required

Fast and professional team communication

Audit readiness maintained at all times

Completes assigned tasks effectively and efficiently and communicates issues promptly

Excellent at creating SOP’s and rolling them out across the organisation

Working Requirements



Full-time remote role

Must be available during Queensland business hours

Reliable high-speed internet and quiet workspace required

Reports directly to Operations Manager / Director

Must demonstrate strong data security and confidentiality practices

Why Join Quest Collective



Mission-driven, high-growth organisation

High ownership senior role

Structured systems and clear expectations

Opportunity to grow with the business

Meaningful work supporting young people and families

Application Instructions



Please submit:

3. Your specific experience with ShiftCare, SCHADS, Fairwork, OHS, WHS and the NDIS



4. Your availability and timezone



5. What makes you stand out from everyone else applying- a great sense of humour and attitude are a must!



Benefits:



Professional development assistance

Work from home

title: Video editor for comedian
description:
About the Role



You must have c2 English because the clips need captions and the comedian has a strong accent. 



We're looking for a skilled, detail-oriented video editor to join the team. You'll be responsible for turning live stand-up footage into viral-ready shorts, engaging medium-length clips, and polished long-form content. This is a fast-paced, high-ownership role where quality and communication matter as much as speed.



What You'll Be Editing

Shorts (under 3 minutes) for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, X, and Threads

Medium-length clips (3–10 minutes) for YouTube

Long-form content and specials for YouTube

Thumbnail variations and cover images for each video



Key Responsibilities

Editing & Clip Selection

Manually review raw stand-up footage and identify strong, self-contained clips with clear hooks and punchlines

Create multiple variations of each clip (different hooks, different lengths, natural vs. fast-paced styles)

Edit shorts to be tight: strong hook in the first 1-2 seconds, no filler, clean ending

Produce natural-cut versions (preferred) and fast-paced versions where needed for longer bits

Keep framing consistent — performer should be centred in frame at all times using position keyframes

Distinguish between crowd work/material and avoid clipping polished material (reserved for live specials)



Captions

Apply accurate captions using SRT files or transcription tools

Use Bebas Neue font, white text with black border as default

Use a different colour for crowd/other voices

Ensure punchlines are NOT spoiled — split caption lines so the punchline appears only when spoken

Review and correct transcription errors, especially for Northern Irish dialect and regional references



Thumbnails & Covers

Create thumbnail variations for YouTube (face big and bright, text prominent)

Design Instagram cover images for each clip

Produce at least 2-3 thumbnail variations per video for A/B testing

Use Photoshop; work from provided PSD templates and raw footage stills



Tracking & Organisation

Maintain and update the Google Sheets content tracker (clip name, format, platform, release date, status, cover links, 
 review link)

Add all clips — including variations — to the tracker before EOD each day

Suggest relevant subreddits for each clip after editing is approved

Track viral content from reference comedians in a separate doc/sheet (max 30 mins/day)

Keep the SOP document updated as new processes are agreed



Communication

Send a Start of Day (SOD) update with planned tasks and working hours (UK time)

Send an End of Day (EOD) report with tasks completed, hours worked, and anything blocked

Be available to overlap with the VA (Mia) between 9–11am UK time for questions and handoffs

Use ClickUp for all tasks — do not rely on WhatsApp notes

Send clips to 
 for review; apply comments before resubmitting



Must-Have Skills & Experience

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (including SRT caption import, position keyframing)

Photoshop skills for thumbnails and cover images

Strong understanding of what makes a short-form comedy clip work (hook, punchline, pacing)

Experience with ClickUp and Google Sheets

Excellent attention to detail — captions, framing, and audio must be accurate

Reliable communicator who sends updates without being chased

Able to handle low-audio footage with EQ adjustments



Nice to Have

Experience editing stand-up comedy or live performance content

Familiarity with comedians like Geoffrey Asmus, Stavros, Ian Bagg (reference style)

Experience managing social media posting via Buffer

Understanding of Reddit communities (r/standup, r/comedy, r/funny, niche subreddits)



Please put Milkshake as your subject line and use 7 apply points. 



Schedule & Pay

Full-time: 40 hours/week

Preferred hours: morning Philippines time (overlapping with 9-11am UK)

Paid weekly via Wise

SOD and EOD updates required every working day

title: Senior Specialist, Graphic & Web Design
description:
About Truegenics:

Truegenics Pte Ltd is a leading e-commerce company based in Singapore with a track record of over US$218M in online product sales. We specialize in e-retailing our own brand of health supplements to a global audience.

We strive to create value and make a positive difference in the world, one life at a time. We believe that even the smallest action can define one’s destiny, and we are committed to creating products that enhance the lives of our consumers.



Why This Role Matters:

We are looking for a Senior Graphic & Web Designer who is passionate about creating meaningful brand experiences. Someone who combines creativity with technical precision and takes full ownership of their work.

You will be the visual voice of our brands, shaping how our products look, feel, and perform across packaging and web experiences. This is a fully remote role, so clear communication, strong collaboration, and accountability are key to your success.

You will partner closely with the marketing, copywriting, and sales teams to create designs that not only look exceptional but also deliver measurable results, driving conversions, strengthening brand reputation, and deepening customer loyalty.



Mission of the Role:

To elevate Truegenics’ visual identity across all touchpoints by ensuring every design supports business objectives, reinforces brand integrity, and resonates with our target audience.

As a senior creative, you will lead by example, maintaining design excellence, guiding junior tea
mbers, and setting high standards for creativity, performance, and consistency across all brands.



Key Responsibilities:



Graphic & Packaging Design (30%)

- Conceptualize and execute creative ideas for digital and packaging projects based on brand direction, marketing briefs, and - customer experience principles.

- Design and adapt packaging across product lines using established brand templates, ensuring consistency while introducing fresh variations for new launches.

- Create digital design assets for websites, social media,
s, and campaigns that engage users and drive conversions.

- Maintain a strong and consistent visual identity across all design outputs, ensuring alignment with brand guidelines and marketing objectives.

- Develop and evolve key brand visuals including logos, icons, color systems, typography, and layout frameworks.

- Translate marketing strategies into visually compelling campaigns that strengthen brand equity and support sales growth.

- Mentor and guide junior designers, providing clear feedback and creative direction to improve quality and efficiency.

- Research and incorporate emerging design trends, creative formats, and audience insights to keep the brand relevant and competitive.



Web Design & Frontend Development (70%)

- Design and develop responsive, high-performing web pages with a strong mobile-first approach, ensuring layouts, navigation, and performance are optimized for mobile users.

- Collaborate with marketing, media, and copywriting teams to design and optimize eCommerce landing pages that convert effectively across devices.

- Apply UX/UI best practices to build layouts that are visually engaging, intuitive to navigate, and optimized for performance.

- Develop reusable page templates and modular design systems to improve speed, consistency, and scalability.

- Ensure all web assets meet quality standards for responsiveness, accessibility, and loading performance.

- Coordinate the execution of promotional web materials, ensuring accuracy, brand consistency, and timely delivery.

- Review and refine the work of junior designers, providing constructive feedback that enhances both creative quality and execution.



Key Requirements:

- Strong portfolio showcasing both digital and web design work. Clear examples of mobile-first design projects will be a plus.

- Expertise in responsive and mobile UX/UI design, including optimizing layouts, images, and performance for smaller screens.

- Experience using AI tools to streamline creative processes, generate ideas, or enhance productivity (for example, generating layout variations, assisting with copy, or automating production tasks).

- Willingness to learn, explore, and adopt new AI tools to improve design quality and efficiency.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to present ideas, feedback, and updates clearly in a remote, cross-functional environment.

- Self-driven, highly organized, and accountable to deadlines.

- Skilled in managing multiple projects while maintaining attention to detail.

- Comfortable collaborating through digital tools and workflows such as Figma, Slack, and Wrike.



Working Arrangement:

This is a fully remote position, open to candidates who can collaborate effectively across digital platforms and time zones.

The potential hire must also be equipped with the following to carry out this role effectively:

- Laptop / CPU with acceptable speed

- At least 1 monitor screen (inclusive of laptop screen)

- Headset with Mic (Noise cancelling)

- Webcam

- Designated Workstation

- Stable and strong power and internet connectivity

- Noise-free and conducive environment



Salary:

[To be discussed based on experience]

title: Jr Data Analyst
description:
Spend smart. Scale fast. Build campaigns that convert at every touchpoint.

Department: Performance Marketing

Location: Remote

Hours: 7 days a week, between 9 AM–6 PM Manila time. Flexible hours, max 40 hrs/week, but at least 2 hrs daily. Daily availability is required.

Target Pay: 70,000 PHP per month



ABOUT AJ MEDIA

We run performance marketing for a portfolio of ecommerce brands — and we're scaling fast. We believe the best media buyers aren't made in agencies. They're made by smart, driven people who treat data like a puzzle and refuse to stop until they've cracked it. If you graduated near the top of your class, you love winning, and you want to get paid to think — this role was built for you.



THE OPPORTUNITY

We don't need five years of experience. We need someone who is sharp, competitive, and hungry. You'll be trained directly by senior media buyers managing millions in ad spend across Taboola, Outbrain, and Revcontent. From day one, you'll be in the data — monitoring campaigns, finding patterns, and making decisions that move the numbers. The best performers here grow into Senior Media Buyers fast.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Monitor daily spend, CPAs, CTRs, and ROAS — proactively flagging trends before they become problems

Launch and optimize native ad campaigns across Taboola, Outbrain, and related platforms

Run A/B tests on creatives, headlines, thumbnails, and landing pages — and draw clear conclusions from the data

Monitor daily/weekly performance reports and dashboards.

Research competitor campaigns and surface new angles and opportunities

Support senior buyers in audience segmentation, budget pacing, and campaign strategy

Stay sharp on native ad trends, platform updates, and industry best practices





WHO YOU ARE

We hire for ceiling, not resume. The ideal candidate is:



A top student — we're talking Dean's List, cum laude, or consistent honors from a leading Philippine university. Academic excellence signals the discipline and analytical rigor we need.

Bachelor’s or advanced degree in a quantitative field such as Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related discipline

A numbers person — you get excited by spreadsheets, not intimidated by them. You find it satisfying to chase down why a metric moved.

Competitive and driven — you hate losing more than you love winning. You set your own bar higher than anyone else does.

A fast learner with grit — you don't wait for perfect conditions to start. You figure things out, ask smart questions, and never stop at 'good enough.'

Detail-obsessed — you notice when numbers don't add up, and you don't move on until you understand why.

Clear communicator — you can translate complex data into a one-line insight that drives a decision.



Experience in paid media is a plus — not a requirement. We will train the right person from zero.



BONUS POINTS IF YOU HAVE

Hands-on experience with Taboola, Outbrain, MGID, or any paid media platform

Familiarity with tracking tools: Voluum, RedTrack, or similar

Google Analytics or comparable analytics platform experience

Knowledge of advertorial formats and native ad copywriting

Comfortable with pixels, redirects, and basic web infrastructure



WHY JOIN US

Learn directly fro
dia buyers with $MM in ad spend under management

Real performance data from day one — no busywork, no busy-being-busy

Clear, fast path to Senior Media Buyer for top performers

Access to premium tools, industry courses, and training resources

Performance incentives tied directly to campaign results



Sound like you? Apply here:
 with your CV and a video introduction on why you're the right person for this role. We read every application personally. No recruiters, no generic forms — just a real conversation about whether we're a fit.

title: Google Ads & Paid Media Manager
description:

We are a rapidly growing performance marketing agency based in Melbourne, Australia. We specialise in SEO, paid media and fractional marketing leadership for medium and large businesses. 



We focus on commercially driven outcomes — connecting paid media performance to real business metrics such as CAC, LTV and profitability.

KPIs

title: SEO Technical and ProJect Lead
description:
SEO Technical Lead & Project Manager (Philippines)



We run a rapidly growing performance marketing agency based in Melbourne, Australia. We specialise in SEO, paid media and Fractional CMO services for medium to large businesses across Australia.



We operate differently from traditional agencies.



Our model combines senior strategic leadership with specialist execution teams, using modern SEO methodologies, performance data, AI-powered efficiencies and structured systems inside ClickUp. We focus on commercial outcomes — not vanity metrics.



We work with brands across B2B, SaaS, education, energy, sport and eCommerce — helping them scale through structured, insight-driven marketing.



As we grow, we are building a world-class offshore delivery team to support our Australian client base.

This role is an opportunity to take ownership of SEO delivery inside a modern, process-driven agency with strong growth ambitions.

 

The Opportunity

We are looking for a highly capable SEO Technical Lead who can own technical delivery, manage content strategy execution and help us build scalable SEO systems.



This is not a task-based role. This is a leadership position within our SEO function.

You will work closely with senior strategy leads in Australia and play a key role in building our SEO playbook and delivery engine.

 

Key Responsibilities

- Technical SEO Ownership

- Conduct advanced technical audits

- Identify and prioritise SEO improvements

- Liaise directly with developers and key stakeholders

- Implement schema, internal linking and structural improvements

- Manage indexing, crawl and site health issues



Content Strategy & Briefing

- Conduct keyword research aligned to commercial goals

- Develop structured content briefs

- Identify content gaps and growth opportunities

- Support content production where required



Backlink Project Management

- Manage third-party backlink providers

- Monitor link quality and authority growth

- Ensure link building aligns with overall SEO strategy



Reporting & Insights

- Manage SEO platforms (SE Ranking, SEMrush, GA4, GSC)

- Produce monthly reports

- Translate data into strategic recommendations



Playbook & Systems Development

- Build and refine our SEO playbook

- Document SOPs in ClickUp

- Standardise templates and processes

 

KPIs

- Ranking improvements for priority keywords

- Growth in organic traffic

- Growth in organic conversions

- Technical health improvements

- On-time delivery

- Client satisfaction

 

What We’re Looking For

- 3–5+ years of SEO experience

- Strong technical SEO capability

- Experience working with developers

- Advanced knowledge of SEO platforms

- Strong documentation and systems mindset

- Proactive, commercially aware thinking

 

Salary & Growth

- Competitive salary package.

- Significant professional development opportunities.



You will work directly with senior marketing strategists and gain exposure to high-growth Australian brands. We are building long-term leadership inside this function.

title: Content & AI Tech Assistant
description:
Build an AI-Powered Content Machine With Us

Full-Time Content & AI Tech Assistant



Most content teams are still doing everything manually.



We’re not.



We’re building an AI-powered content and marketing engine that turns ideas into videos, posts, ads, and campaigns quickly and consistently.



To help build and operate that system, we’re hiring a Content & AI Tech Assistant.



This role is part content assistant, part tech assistant, and part AI systems operator.



You’ll help edit and distribute content, support marketing operations, and assist with the automation systems and AI tools that power everything behind the scenes.



You’ll work closely with our lead tech operator, helping run and improve the systems that drive our marketing.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys technology, AI tools, content, and learning new systems quickly.



This is not a freelance role and not a side hustle.



We are looking for someone who wants a long-term full-time position and is excited to grow with a team building modern AI-driven marketing systems.



What You'll Be Helping With

Content Editing & Creative Support



Editing video content (primarily using CapCut or similar tools)



Creating short-form clips from longer content



Creating static creatives and simple graphics using tools like Canva



Supporting AI-generated creatives



Content Scheduling & Distribution



Uploading and scheduling content across platforms



Organising content in scheduling tools



Assisting with ongoing content publishing



Marketing & Ad Support



Supporting tasks inside Meta Ads Manager



Uploading creatives and ad variations



Organising campaigns and marketing assets



Tech & Automation Support



Supporting systems built in GoHighLevel



Assisting with automation workflows



Helping maintain internal tech systems



AI Tools & Automation Systems



We are actively building systems that use AI to support marketing operations.



You may help operate or assist with tools such as:



ChatGPT / Claude / large language models



Claude Code



N8N automation



AI-assisted content systems



Internal marketing automation tools



You are not expected to know all of these tools already.



What matters most is that you are comfortable with technology and can learn new tools quickly.



Tools We Commonly Use



CapCut (or other video editors)



Canva



GoHighLevel



Meta Ads Manager



N8N



Claude / AI language models



AI creative tools such as Nano Banana



Experience with these tools is helpful, but not required.



We care more about your willingness and ability to learn quickly.



The Type of Person We're Looking For



You are someone who is:



• Hardworking

• Reliable

• Detail-oriented

• Comfortable with technology

• Curious about AI and automation

• Able to learn new tools quickly

• Confident communicating in clear, fluent English



You should also enjoy supporting systems and helping a team run efficiently.



This role supports a UK-based team, so strong written and spoken English is essential.



Important Notes



This role is full-time only.



We are not looking for freelancers or people juggling multiple full-time jobs.



We are looking for someone who wants a stable long-term role and is excited to grow as our systems and team expand.



Salary



$6 – $7 USD per hour

Full-Time



How To Apply (Important)



Please follow the instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be considered.



Step 1 — Use This Exact Subject Line



When applying through OnlineJobs.ph, use this exact subject line:



“I Am Your Content & AI Tech Assistant”



Step 2 — Submit a Loom Video



Please submit a 3–5 minute Loom video answering the following questions.



You must answer these by speaking on video.



Typed answers will not be accepted.



Please answer:



1?? Why do you believe you are a good fit for this role?



2?? Tell us something you are passionate about outside of work.



3?? Tell us about something you stayed disciplined with long-term.

What was it and how did you stay consistent?



4?? What video editing tools have you used before?

(Examples: CapCut, Premiere, Final Cut, etc.)



5?? What experience do you have with any of the following tools?



GoHighLevel



Canva



Meta Ads



N8N



Claude / AI tools



CapCut or other editing software



6?? How do you currently use AI tools or large language models in your work or daily life?

Please give specific examples.



7?? If you have not used some of these tools before, why do you believe you would be able to learn them quickly?



Step 3 — DISC Personality Profile



Please ensure your DISC personality assessment is completed inside your OnlineJobs.ph profile.



Your DISC results must be visible on your profile.



Applications Will Not Be Considered If:



• The subject line is incorrect

• A Loom video is not submitted

• The Loom video does not answer all questions

• The DISC assessment is missing from your OnlineJobs profile



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the team long-term and help build modern systems at the intersection of content, AI, marketing, and automation.



If that sounds like you, we look forward to meeting you.

title: Expert US Executive Assistant to the CEO (50 hours a week)
description:
About the Role

The Executive Assistant to the CEO serves as the operational backbone of Parity's strategic projects and organizational systems. You will build project timelines, track deliverables, manage cross-team communication, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. The right person is detail-oriented, solutions-focused, and energized by helping teams turn vision into execution.



Key Responsibilities

Cross-Team Coordination



Coordinate and document strategic meetings, identifying next steps and responsible parties.

Manage projects using ClickUp and maintain accountability across teams.

Track deliverables, dependencies, and timelines across multiple initiatives.

Proactively flag delays, identify solutions, and adjust schedules as needed.

Maintain a central project calendar to ensure visibility of all major deadlines.

Administrative Support



Maintain and optimize the CEO's calendar, prioritizing key meetings and deadlines.

Coordinate internal and external meetings across multiple time zones.

Send reminders, prepare meeting briefs, and manage scheduling conflicts.

Monitor and organize the executive's inbox, drafting and sending professional communications.

Filter and prioritize messages to keep focus on strategic initiatives.

Written and Internal Communications



Draft and edit polished, brand-aligned written content such as
s, newsletters, blog posts, and internal memos.

Create client-facing materials including announcements, templates, and onboarding documents.

Maintain SOPs, team handbooks, and process documentation.

Travel and Event Coordination



Plan and manage travel logistics, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation.

Prepare detailed itineraries and oversee travel budgets.

Organize virtual or in-person events, conferences, and client meetings.

Systems and Process Management



Support implementation and optimization of communication and documentation tools.

Identify process improvements and lead automation initiatives.

Create internal reports and dashboards to track KPIs and organizational impact.

Support evaluation and reporting of grant deliverables and partner-funded projects.



Qualifications

Minimum 3 years of experience as an Executive Assistant supporting senior leadership or a CEO.

Background in mass communication, media, or content writing preferred.

At least 2 years of experience working remotely in the Eastern Time Zone.

Exceptional organizational, time management, and multitasking skills.

Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

Proficiency with ClickUp, Microsoft Workspace, Zoom, and cloud-based file systems.

Strong initiative and independence in managing competing priorities.

Experience supporting virtual teams in a fully remote environment.

Role Information

Fully remote position

Approximate 50-hour work week



Schedule:  EST

Compensation: $1300 USD

title: Founder Growth Systems Operator
description:
Part-time to start. 30 hours per week.



Pay: $12 to $16 USD per hour, based on proof, experience, and interview performance

Clear path to 40 hours, more ownership, and higher pay for the right person

Performance bonuses are available for qualified meetings held that meet our agreed qualification criteria



A qualified meeting means the company is a real fit for MoveUp, the person is a buyer or clear stakeholder in the buying decision, and the problem is relevant to what we actually sell. It is not just a booked calendar slot.



MoveUp Studio is a premium motion and strategy partner for B2B SaaS and tech. We make complex clear.



We are hiring a Founder Growth Systems Operator to build, run, and continuously improve our founder-led growth engine.



This is not a basic admin role.



This role is for someone who can think clearly, write well, design workflows, implement automation, and move work forward without being chased.



You will work directly with the founders and turn rough founder input into real execution across outbound, founder content, CRM, and workflow systems.



When a prospect replies and a real sales conversation begins, the founders step in directly.



Priority of the role



The primary goal of this role is qualified conversations with the right companies.



Outbound execution, founder LinkedIn presence, CRM discipline, and automation all exist to support that outcome.



If you are stronger in admin or pure content than commercial execution, this is not the role.



Expected time split



45% outbound prospecting, personalized outreach, follow-up, and meeting generation



25% founder LinkedIn content and distribution



15% HubSpot hygiene, reporting, and workflow improvement



15% automation, workflow improvement, and system refinement



What you will own

Outbound prospecting and meeting generation



Build targeted prospect lists using Apollo or similar prospecting tools.



Segment well. Research properly.



Write thoughtful
 and LinkedIn outreach that feels specific and relevant.



Build and manage outreach sequences with strong judgement. Know when to personalise, when to follow up, and when to stop.



LinkedIn messaging is manual only. No bots. No scraping. No browser extensions. No account risk.



Automation is used to improve consistency, follow-up discipline, and execution speed. Not to spam or fake relevance.



Follow up with discipline and respect. Quality over volume.



You understand deliverability basics. Clean lists, careful sending, proper unsubscribe handling, and respect for domain reputation.



Founder LinkedIn presence



Turn rough founder notes, opinions, lessons, proof, and insights into strong LinkedIn posts.



Maintain a consistent weekly founder posting rhythm.



Repurpose ideas, project proof, screenshots, clips, and insights into simple, clear content.



Support distribution through comments, reposts, and thoughtful follow-up where useful.



Track what drives profile visits, replies, conversations, and qualified interest.



HubSpot and pipeline hygiene



Keep HubSpot accurate, current, and useful.



Update contacts, companies, deals, notes, tasks, and stages so the CRM reflects reality.



Improve pipeline hygiene, contact organisation, and reporting.



Build simple SOPs, templates, and processes that make execution easier every week.



Set up and improve simple
 workflows such as follow-ups, nurture sequences, and a founder newsletter where useful.



Automation and growth systems



Design and improve practical workflows across prospecting, CRM, task creation, reporting, and handoffs.



Connect Apollo or similar tools, HubSpot, and supporting tools into a clean working system.



Use automation and AI to reduce manual work, improve consistency, and strengthen follow-up.



Continuously refine workflows as the system evolves.



Know what should stay manual, especially targeting judgement, real personalisation, reply handling, and anything that risks trust or account health.



No spam. No brittle hacks. No fake personalisation. No automations that create noise instead of useful pipeline movement.



What success looks like



Outbound runs every week with strong targeting and disciplined follow-up.



150 to 250 quality outbound touches per week across
 and LinkedIn.



A real touch means a researched message sent with a specific reason for outreach. Not a template blast.



Meetings that are poorly qualified or weakly aligned do not count as success.



Founder LinkedIn postings run consistently each week.



HubSpot stays clean and usable.



Simple weekly reporting we can trust.



Automation gradually reduces manual admin and improves workflow reliability.



Growth in replies, warm conversations, and qualified interest.



At steady state this role should generate 2 to 4 qualified meetings per month, with higher output expected as targeting and messaging improve.



The core score of this role is qualified conversations created for the founders.



First 30 days' priorities



Learn our offer, proof, tone, and target market.



Tighten the prospecting and outreach workflow.



Launch consistent outbound.



Clean and standardise HubSpot.



Establish a consistent founder LinkedIn posting cadence.



Implement or improve simple automation that reduces manual work and strengthens follow-up.



Generate early positive replies and qualified conversations.



What we need from you



Strong written English. Clear, sharp, natural writing.



Real experience writing outbound messages, LinkedIn content, or related B2B writing.



Experience with Apollo or similar prospecting tools.



Working knowledge of HubSpot beyond basic data entry.



Strong judgement around outreach. You understand the difference between relevant outreach and spam.



High ownership. You identify gaps, fix problems, and improve systems without being chased.



Practical automation capability. You can build or improve workflows across prospecting, CRM, reporting, follow-up, and task handoff.



You are comfortable using AI across research, drafting, repurposing, and workflow execution. We care about whether the final output is sharp, human, accurate, and commercially useful.



Generic copy, fake personalisation, bloated writing, and low-judgement automation will not work here.



Nice to have



Experience writing for founders, agencies, or B2B SaaS brands



Experience building simple CRM workflows or reports



Good eye for formatting, screenshots, visuals, and presentation



Experience supporting both outbound and content execution



This role is a strong fit if



You are stronger than a VA and want a real growth seat.



You enjoy both writing and operations.



You like building systems and improving them over time.



You want a role that can grow quickly if you prove yourself.



This role is not for you if



You need constant daily direction.



Your writing sounds generic or like a template d.



Your outreach style is volume first and relevance second.



You enjoy content but struggle to connect it to the pipeline.



Your samples do not prove the work you claim.



How to apply



Send the following in one
.



A short cover letter explaining why this role fits you.



Two examples of outbound
s, LinkedIn messages, or similar B2B outreach you personally wrote.



Two LinkedIn posts you personally wrote for a founder, agency, consultant, or B2B company.



One short note describing a workflow, automation, or system you built or improved. Explain what problem it solved and what tools were involved.



Where possible, include results such as reply rate, meetings booked, pipeline created, or another measurable outcome.



Applications that do not include the items above will not be considered.



Shortlisted candidates will complete a live interview and working session where we assess writing quality, targeting judgement, workflow thinking, CRM thinking, and automation judgement.



We care more about clear thinking, relevance, and real results than polished wording.

title: Online Poker Operations Assistant (SDR + Table Management)
description:
Hours: 4-6 hours per day

Schedule: Must be available starting 11:00 AM Central European Time

Pay: Base salary + performance bonus

Language: English (use of translation tools like DeepL is fully supported)



About the Role

We run an online poker operation across multiple private poker clubs on mobile apps. We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented assistant who will handle two core areas of the business:



Outreach & lead tracking (SDR work): contacting poker club agents and affiliates, following up on leads, and keeping our pipeline organized.

Table & session management: monitoring active poker games, managing player interactions, and keeping records up to date.



You'll be working with ready-made scripts, templates, and tools, so you don't need prior poker experience. What matters most is that you're organized, responsive, and not afraid of repetitive but important work.



What You'll Be Doing



SDR / Outreach:



Reach out to poker club agents and affiliates via
, Instagram, and WhatsApp using provided scripts

Follow up on leads and track responses

Log all club and agent information into our tracking system (Google Sheets / Notion)

Coordinate with our internal team on new club approvals



Table / Operations:



Put all the information to the tables

Flag any issues to the team promptly

Keep session logs and performance records accurate and up to date





What We're Looking For



Some experience in sales, outreach, or lead generation (you've done cold outreach or follow-ups before, even informally)

Comfortable working with messaging apps 
, WhatsApp, Instagram DMs) as work tools

Organized and able to manage multiple conversations at once without dropping the ball

Reliable and available consistently starting at 11 AM CET

Comfortable using translation tools (DeepL, Google Translate) for non-English messages (we work with contacts in multiple languages)

Basic spreadsheet skills (Google Sheets)

Honest and trustworthy (this role involves handling sensitive operational information)





Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience in online gaming, poker, or gambling industry

Familiarity with Notion

Experience managing
 groups or bots





What We Offer



Competitive base pay + performance bonuses tied to results

Fully remote, work from anywhere

Clear systems, scripts, and tools provided so there's no guessing what to do

Stable, ongoing work with room to grow as the operation scales

Direct communication with the team lead, no corporate bureaucracy





How to Apply

Please send a short message (3–5 sentences) telling us:



Any outreach or sales experience you've had (even informal)

Your available hours and timezone

Why you think you'd be good at this kind of work



Applications without a personal message will not be considered.

title: Lead Generation & Marketing Assistant — Remote | Long-Term
description:
Lead Generation & Marketing Assistant — Remote | Long-Term | Satou Agency



Location: Remote (Worldwide)

Schedule: Full-time

Salary: Competitive, based on experience + performance-based raises

Type: Long-term, stable position



About Us

Satou Agency is a fast-growing international PR & Digital Marketing agency helping exceptional professionals get noticed, trusted, and recognized worldwide. We work with clients across the USA, Europe, Asia, Africa, and CIS markets — specializing in strategic visibility, media placements, industry awards, and high-profile recognition opportunities.

We're a small, close-knit remote team — and we take hiring seriously. We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for a person who is technically sharp, communicates with confidence, and wants to grow with us over the long term.



What This Role Is

This is a research, operations, and client communication role at the core of our business. You will build and maintain lead lists, manage CRM systems, support outreach campaigns, create materials, and communicate directly with international clients.

This role requires someone who can think analytically, handle structured data with precision, navigate multiple digital tools confidently, and write professional business English without hesitation. If you're organized, tech-savvy, and thrive in a clear system-driven environment — this role will suit you well.



What You'll Do Day-to-Day

Lead Generation & Outreach



Find and qualify leads on LinkedIn (advanced search) and other platforms

Research companies, decision-makers, and contact details

Build, structure, and maintain accurate contact databases



CRM &
 Automation



Manage and update CRM systems — primarily HubSpot and 

Create and maintain sales funnels and automation workflows

Build and execute targeted
 outreach campaigns, manage mailing lists



Data & Spreadsheet Management



Work with Google Sheets and Excel at a confident level — formulas, pivot tables, data structuring and cleanup

Keep all records organized, accurate, and up to date



Client Communication



Correspond with international clients via
 and messaging — professionally, clearly, and on time

Coordinate tasks and follow up internally to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Presentations & Materials



Create polished presentations in Canva and PowerPoint for client pitches and internal use

Design basic marketing materials in Canva



AI & Tools



Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to streamline research, outreach, and daily workflows

Adapt quickly to new platforms and troubleshoot minor technical issues independently



Who We're Looking For

This role is best suited for someone with a technical or analytical background — IT, engineering, data, economics, or a related field — who has strong communication skills and is comfortable working in a fast-paced international environment.

Required:



Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, or a related technical field (or equivalent hands-on experience)

Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar role — lead generation, marketing operations, digital assistant, or technical support

Advanced English — written and spoken. You will correspond with international clients. Grammar, tone, and clarity are non-negotiable.

Expert-level Google Sheets / Excel — formulas, pivot tables, data organization

Hands-on experience with HubSpot, 
, or similar CRM / outreach platforms

Proficiency in Canva and PowerPoint for presentation and materials creation

Strong LinkedIn search and lead generation skills

Detail-oriented, self-organized, and able to meet deadlines independently



Strong plus:



Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or 

Background in B2B marketing, tech, or PR/communications

Experience working with US or European clients directly

Familiarity with Adobe Photoshop, CapCut, or Adobe Premiere Pro





What We Offer



100% remote — work from anywhere

Long-term, stable position with strong preference for internal growth

Direct exposure to international clients and global markets

Clear processes, no micromanagement

Performance-based salary increases

Real growth path: Lead Gen Specialist ? Marketing Ops ? Senior Assistant / Team Lead





How to Apply

Send us a short message that includes:



A brief overview of your background and relevant experience (3–5 sentences)

Your English level and any experience communicating with international clients

One example of a research, data, or lead generation task you've completed

Tools you've worked with (Google Sheets, HubSpot, LinkedIn, AI tools, etc.)



We read every application personally. Candidates who meet our criteria will be invited to a short Zoom interview.

mber. Performance review after 3 months with potential pay increase.

title: Creative AI Content Creator – Videos, Images, Books
description:
Creative AI Content Creator – Videos, Images, Books



Hello,



My name is Kippi.



I’m looking for a creative person from the Philippines who might enjoy working together with me online.



I’m passionate about the Bible, and right now I’m using AI image tools and animation to create Bible story videos for YouTube. I also want to write and promote books. I already have a health book on Amazon, but it needs fresh ideas and better marketing.



I’m a little old-school, so I’m hoping to find someone with younger creativity who understands AI tools, video, social media, and marketing.



Some things we may work on together:



• creating AI images  

• animating images into short videos  

• YouTube video editing  

• helping organize writing or book projects  

• marketing ideas and social media



You don’t need to know everything already. If you are creative, curious, and willing to learn, we can grow and build things together.



Please send me:



1. A short note about yourself  

2. What tools you use or are learning (AI, video, editing, etc.)  

3. If possible, a short video introduction so I can meet you



Also answer this question:



If you had access to powerful AI tools and the internet’s knowledge, what would you create?



Start your message with the word Genesis so I know you read the whole post.



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph so I can review your application.



Looking forward to meeting you.



 Kippi

Blessings

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Reels & TikTok for Personal Brands)
description:
Absolutely — here it is reworked to match **Cole’s structure** more closely, with the **paid trial removed** and your criteria woven in.



## THE ROLE: Social-First Editing With Ownership



I’m looking for a professional **Video Editor** who thrives on autonomy. This is a flexible remote role. I don’t believe in micro-management or tracking your every move. You’ll have the flexibility to manage your own schedule, as long as the work is strong and deadlines are hit.



I need someone who can do more than just cut clips together. You’ll be editing **Instagram Reels and TikTok videos** for client accounts, working from raw footage, content ideas, and strategic direction. At the start, there will be support on the strategy side, but over time I want someone who can take ownership of the edit itself, make good decisions independently, and turn footage into content that feels sharp, engaging, and platform-native.



You should be comfortable reviewing footage, spotting the strongest 
nts, shaping the structure of the video, and feeding back on what footage would be more useful to capture next time so the content gets better over time.



## THE VIBE: High Standards, Speed & Good Judgement



While this role offers a lot of flexibility, it is a professional position.



**The Pace:** I’m looking for someone who wants to build speed and efficiency over time. This role requires fast turnaround and strong judgement.



**The Pressure:** Most days are smooth, but this can be a fast-moving environment when multiple edits land at once or deadlines get tight. I need someone who stays level-headed, communicates clearly, and keeps their standards high.



**The Standard:** I’m looking for someone who understands short-form content, not just editing software. You should know what makes a Reel or TikTok work in terms of pacing, hooks, captions, structure, and retention.



## COMPENSATION & TERMS



**Salary:** $700 USD per month

**Payment:** Paid consistently on the last Friday of every month

**Schedule:** Monday to Friday (Work when you want)

**Turnaround:** Same-day turnaround preferred, 24 hours maximum unless agreed otherwise in advance

**Equipment:** You must have your own professional editing suite and high-speed hardware

**Perks:** Holidays are included



## APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)



I want to see your talent, not a document. Do not send me a CV or a Resume. CVs will be dismissed immediately.



To apply, please provide **EXACTLY 5 links** to your absolute best work.

No more than 5. No fewer than 5. No general portfolio links.



I want to see the 5 pieces of work you are most proud of that demonstrate your ability to edit strong **short-form social content** for platforms like **Instagram Reels and TikTok**.



Ideally, your examples should show range across:



* talking-head edits

* educational or insight-led content

* faster-paced engaging edits

* client-facing or personal brand content



If you can follow these instructions, we’re already off to a great start.



If you want, I can also do a second pass that makes it sound a bit more like **you** and a bit less like Cole, while keeping his exact structure.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT – Phone Communications & Soft Sales [REMOTE]
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE**

We’re a close, family-like U.S. long-term rental company looking for a sharp, resourceful, people-savvy Executive Assistant to support day-to-day operations. We’re hiring someone with proven, long-term professional experience — in any field. This is NOT an entry-level position.



We’ll train you on the “what” with leasing — but we need you to bring the “how” with real objection-handling and soft sales intuition. That means:

**Thinking fast under pressure and during live calls

**Guiding conversations naturally and persuasively

**Solving problems before they escalate

**Speaking English clearly and confidently on the phone

**Caring about the business like it’s your own



We value people who treat the business like they’re part of it — not just clocking hours. If you’re the kind of person who goes the extra mile because you take pride in doing great work, you’ll thrive here.



**WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO**

• Be a reliable, professional point of contact for current tenants

• Manage lease renewals and ongoing tenant communication

• Make phone calls to gather info, follow up, and resolve issues

• Coordinate tasks, track details, and prevent things from falling through the cracks

• Help solve problems independently — and escalate only when needed

• Keep the owner organized and focused



-> This is not a checklist-following job. It’s a *thinking* role for someone who can move fast, stay calm, and figure things out...many times while still on the phone.



**WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR**

• *You speak clearly, confidently, and professionally in English — especially on calls*

• You’re a natural problem solver who can handle unexpected challenges without panic

• You think fast, take initiative, and don’t need hand-holding

• You genuinely care about the quality of your work and the business you’re supporting

• You’re someone who prepares, researches, and shows up ready

• You value long-term stability and being part of a trusted team



-> No property management or sales experience required

-> *Training around Property Management provided — but success in this role depends on your ability to communicate smoothly and handle live conversations with clarity and confidence*



**WORK SCHEDULE**

This is Remote (Work from Home – must have reliable computer & internet)

• Full-time (40 hours/week) | Independent Contractor

• You choose your exact working hours, but must be reachable and responsive during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (7 AM – 7 PM, Mon–Fri), with active work occurring within that window



**COMPENSATION & GROWTH**

*Base pay up to $800/month to start,* with performance-based increases and bonuses for reliability, initiative, and strong work ethic.

Long-term role with real stability — no short-term rentals, no Airbnb chaos

Direct collaboration with the business owner — your work will actually make a difference



**FROM A CURRENT TEA
MBER**

“Working with Heavenly Happy Homes over the past year has been an experience I am truly blessed and grateful for. It has indeed been life-changing. From the very beginning, I felt trusted, supported, and encouraged to do my best. That kind of environment makes a huge difference, especially when working remotely. After going through uncertainty in a previous role, I was really praying to find a company where I could grow, learn, and feel secure long-term. Heavenly Happy Homes turned out to be exactly that and more. You genuinely find yourself loving the company and sincerely caring about the work you do. The culture here is respectful and collaborative, and everyone truly wants to see each other succeed. Even as a remote team, there is a strong sense of teamwork and shared purpose, which I honestly love. Training is efficient and well guided. R.S. helped me a lot, especially in understanding processes clearly. Another thing I can sincerely say is that hard work here never goes unnoticed. It is always valued and genuinely appreciated. Our boss is truly a wonderful employer!”



**HOW TO APPLY**

Submit your application here: 

Applications through OLJ may not be considered. Please complete the application at the link in this post.
